question: What is the minimum avg buy price of any holding?
sql: SELECT MIN(avg_buy_price) FROM holdings

question: Find all instruments with a market cap greater than 1000 cr
sql: SELECT * FROM instruments WHERE market_cap_cr > 1000

question: What is the total quantity of each instrument held by investors with a high risk profile?
sql: SELECT i.name, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors inv ON p.investor_id = inv.investor_id JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id WHERE inv.risk_profile = 'High' GROUP BY i.name

question: List the average buy price of each instrument in a portfolio, grouped by portfolio name
sql: SELECT p.name, i.symbol, AVG(h.avg_buy_price) AS avg_buy_price FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY p.name, i.symbol

question: Find the total brokerage paid by each investor, grouped by investor name
sql: SELECT inv.full_name, SUM(t.brokerage) AS total_brokerage FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors inv ON p.investor_id = inv.investor_id GROUP BY inv.full_name

question: What is the total market capitalization of all instruments in each portfolio?
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(i.market_cap_cr) AS total_market_cap FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY p.name

question: Show me the quantity of each instrument traded by investors with a medium risk profile, grouped by instrument name
sql: SELECT i.name, SUM(t.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors inv ON p.investor_id = inv.investor_id JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id WHERE inv.risk_profile = 'Medium' GROUP BY i.name

question: List all instruments with a market capitalization greater than 1000 cr, grouped by sector
sql: SELECT i.sector, i.symbol, i.market_cap_cr FROM instruments i WHERE i.market_cap_cr > 1000 GROUP BY i.sector, i.symbol, i.market_cap_cr

question: Find the average current price of each instrument in a portfolio, grouped by portfolio name
sql: SELECT p.name, i.symbol, AVG(h.current_price) AS avg_current_price FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY p.name, i.symbol

question: What is the total quantity of each instrument held by investors, grouped by investor name and instrument name
sql: SELECT inv.full_name, i.name, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors inv ON p.investor_id = inv.investor_id JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY inv.full_name, i.name

question: Show me the total quantity of each instrument traded, grouped by instrument name and trade type
sql: SELECT i.name, t.trade_type, SUM(t.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.name, t.trade_type

question: List all portfolios with a total quantity of instruments greater than 100, grouped by portfolio name
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.name HAVING SUM(h.quantity) > 100

question: Find the total brokerage paid by each investor, grouped by investor name and trade type
sql: SELECT inv.full_name, t.trade_type, SUM(t.brokerage) AS total_brokerage FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors inv ON p.investor_id = inv.investor_id GROUP BY inv.full_name, t.trade_type

question: What is the average buy price of each instrument, grouped by instrument name and sector
sql: SELECT i.name, i.sector, AVG(h.avg_buy_price) AS avg_buy_price FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.name, i.sector

question: Show me the quantity of each instrument held by investors with a low risk profile, grouped by instrument name
sql: SELECT i.name, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors inv ON p.investor_id = inv.investor_id JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id WHERE inv.risk_profile = 'Low' GROUP BY i.name

question: List all instruments with a market capitalization less than 500 cr, grouped by sector
sql: SELECT i.sector, i.symbol, i.market_cap_cr FROM instruments i WHERE i.market_cap_cr < 500 GROUP BY i.sector, i.symbol, i.market_cap_cr

question: Find the total quantity of each instrument traded by investors, grouped by investor name and instrument name
sql: SELECT inv.full_name, i.name, SUM(t.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors inv ON p.investor_id = inv.investor_id JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY inv.full_name, i.name

question: What is the total market capitalization of all instruments in each sector?
sql: SELECT i.sector, SUM(i.market_cap_cr) AS total_market_cap FROM instruments i GROUP BY i.sector

question: Show me the average current price of each instrument, grouped by instrument name and sector
sql: SELECT i.name, i.sector, AVG(h.current_price) AS avg_current_price FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.name, i.sector

question: List all portfolios with a total brokerage paid greater than 1000, grouped by portfolio name
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(t.brokerage) AS total_brokerage FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.name HAVING SUM(t.brokerage) > 1000

question: Find the total quantity of each instrument held by investors, grouped by investor name and sector
sql: SELECT inv.full_name, i.sector, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors inv ON p.investor_id = inv.investor_id JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY inv.full_name, i.sector

question: What is the average buy price of each instrument in a portfolio, grouped by portfolio name and instrument type
sql: SELECT p.name, i.instrument_type, AVG(h.avg_buy_price) AS avg_buy_price FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY p.name, i.instrument_type

question: What is the total quantity of each instrument held by all portfolios, grouped by instrument name?
sql: SELECT i.name, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.name

question: List all portfolios with their total market value, calculated by multiplying the quantity of each instrument by its current price, grouped by portfolio name?
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_market_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.name

question: Find the average brokerage paid for each trade type, grouped by trade type?
sql: SELECT t.trade_type, AVG(t.brokerage) AS average_brokerage FROM trades t GROUP BY t.trade_type

question: Show me the total quantity of each instrument traded, grouped by instrument symbol and trade type?
sql: SELECT i.symbol, t.trade_type, SUM(t.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.symbol, t.trade_type

question: Which investors have portfolios with a total market value greater than 1 million, calculated by multiplying the quantity of each instrument by its current price, grouped by investor full name?
sql: SELECT iv.full_name, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_market_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors iv ON p.investor_id = iv.investor_id GROUP BY iv.full_name HAVING SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) > 1000000

question: What is the total market capitalization of all instruments in each sector, grouped by sector?
sql: SELECT i.sector, SUM(i.market_cap_cr) AS total_market_capitalization FROM instruments i GROUP BY i.sector

question: List all instruments with their average buy price, calculated by dividing the total buy value by the total quantity, grouped by instrument name?
sql: SELECT i.name, AVG(h.avg_buy_price) AS average_buy_price FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.name

question: Find the total brokerage paid for each instrument, grouped by instrument symbol?
sql: SELECT i.symbol, SUM(t.brokerage) AS total_brokerage FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.symbol

question: Show me the number of portfolios for each investor, grouped by investor full name?
sql: SELECT iv.full_name, COUNT(p.portfolio_id) AS number_of_portfolios FROM portfolios p JOIN investors iv ON p.investor_id = iv.investor_id GROUP BY iv.full_name

question: Which portfolios have a total quantity of instruments greater than 100, grouped by portfolio name?
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.name HAVING SUM(h.quantity) > 100

question: What is the average current price of each instrument, grouped by instrument type?
sql: SELECT i.instrument_type, AVG(h.current_price) AS average_current_price FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.instrument_type

question: List all trades with their total value, calculated by multiplying the quantity by the price, grouped by trade type?
sql: SELECT t.trade_type, SUM(t.quantity * t.price) AS total_value FROM trades t GROUP BY t.trade_type

question: Find the total market value of all portfolios, calculated by multiplying the quantity of each instrument by its current price, grouped by investor risk profile?
sql: SELECT iv.risk_profile, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_market_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors iv ON p.investor_id = iv.investor_id GROUP BY iv.risk_profile

question: Show me the number of trades for each instrument, grouped by instrument symbol?
sql: SELECT i.symbol, COUNT(t.trade_id) AS number_of_trades FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.symbol

question: Which investors have portfolios with a total quantity of instruments greater than 500, grouped by investor full name?
sql: SELECT iv.full_name, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors iv ON p.investor_id = iv.investor_id GROUP BY iv.full_name HAVING SUM(h.quantity) > 500

question: What is the total brokerage paid for each trade type, grouped by trade type?
sql: SELECT t.trade_type, SUM(t.brokerage) AS total_brokerage FROM trades t GROUP BY t.trade_type

question: List all instruments with their total traded quantity, grouped by instrument name?
sql: SELECT i.name, SUM(t.quantity) AS total_traded_quantity FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.name

question: Find the average quantity of each instrument held by all portfolios, grouped by instrument type?
sql: SELECT i.instrument_type, AVG(h.quantity) AS average_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.instrument_type

question: Show me the total market value of all instruments in each sector, calculated by multiplying the quantity of each instrument by its current price, grouped by sector?
sql: SELECT i.sector, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_market_value FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.sector

question: What is the total quantity of each instrument in all portfolios?
sql: SELECT i.symbol, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.symbol

question: List the names of investors with more than one portfolio
sql: SELECT i.full_name FROM investors i JOIN portfolios p ON i.investor_id = p.investor_id GROUP BY i.full_name HAVING COUNT(p.portfolio_id) > 1

question: Find the average buy price of each instrument across all portfolios
sql: SELECT i.symbol, AVG(h.avg_buy_price) AS avg_buy_price FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.symbol

question: Show me the total value of each portfolio
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.name

question: Which instruments have an average market cap greater than 1000 cr?
sql: SELECT i.symbol, AVG(i.market_cap_cr) AS avg_market_cap FROM instruments i GROUP BY i.symbol HAVING AVG(i.market_cap_cr) > 1000

question: List all portfolios with more than 5 trades
sql: SELECT p.name FROM portfolios p JOIN trades t ON p.portfolio_id = t.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.name HAVING COUNT(t.trade_id) > 5

question: What is the total brokerage paid by each investor?
sql: SELECT i.full_name, SUM(t.brokerage) AS total_brokerage FROM investors i JOIN portfolios p ON i.investor_id = p.investor_id JOIN trades t ON p.portfolio_id = t.portfolio_id GROUP BY i.full_name

question: Find the maximum quantity traded for each instrument
sql: SELECT i.symbol, MAX(t.quantity) AS max_quantity FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.symbol

question: Show me the total quantity of each instrument traded by each portfolio
sql: SELECT p.name, i.symbol, SUM(t.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY p.name, i.symbol

question: Which investors have a risk profile of 'conservative' and have traded more than 1000 quantity?
sql: SELECT i.full_name FROM investors i JOIN portfolios p ON i.investor_id = p.investor_id JOIN trades t ON p.portfolio_id = t.portfolio_id WHERE i.risk_profile = 'conservative' GROUP BY i.full_name HAVING SUM(t.quantity) > 1000

question: List all instruments with a market cap greater than 500 cr and traded more than 100 quantity
sql: SELECT i.symbol FROM instruments i JOIN trades t ON i.instrument_id = t.instrument_id WHERE i.market_cap_cr > 500 GROUP BY i.symbol HAVING SUM(t.quantity) > 100

question: What is the average price of each instrument traded by each portfolio?
sql: SELECT p.name, i.symbol, AVG(t.price) AS avg_price FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY p.name, i.symbol

question: Find the total value of each instrument held by each portfolio
sql: SELECT p.name, i.symbol, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY p.name, i.symbol

question: Show me the total brokerage paid for each instrument
sql: SELECT i.symbol, SUM(t.brokerage) AS total_brokerage FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.symbol

question: Which portfolios have more than 10 holdings?
sql: SELECT p.name FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.name HAVING COUNT(h.holding_id) > 10

question: List all investors with a demat account and have traded more than 500 quantity
sql: SELECT i.full_name FROM investors i JOIN portfolios p ON i.investor_id = p.investor_id JOIN trades t ON p.portfolio_id = t.portfolio_id WHERE i.demat_account IS NOT NULL GROUP BY i.full_name HAVING SUM(t.quantity) > 500

question: What is the total quantity of each instrument held by each investor?
sql: SELECT i.full_name, i2.symbol, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM investors i JOIN portfolios p ON i.investor_id = p.investor_id JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id JOIN instruments i2 ON h.instrument_id = i2.instrument_id GROUP BY i.full_name, i2.symbol

question: Find the average market cap of each sector
sql: SELECT i.sector, AVG(i.market_cap_cr) AS avg_market_cap FROM instruments i GROUP BY i.sector

question: Show me the total value of each sector
sql: SELECT i.sector, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.sector

question: Which investors have a risk profile of 'aggressive' and have held more than 1000 quantity?
sql: SELECT i.full_name FROM investors i JOIN portfolios p ON i.investor_id = p.investor_id JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id WHERE i.risk_profile = 'aggressive' GROUP BY i.full_name HAVING SUM(h.quantity) > 1000

question: What is the total quantity of each instrument type held by all investors?
sql: SELECT i.instrument_type, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.instrument_type

question: List all portfolios with their total market value, sorted by market value in descending order
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_market_value FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY total_market_value DESC

question: Find the average brokerage paid by each investor for buying instruments, grouped by risk profile
sql: SELECT i.risk_profile, AVG(t.brokerage) AS avg_brokerage FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors i ON p.investor_id = i.investor_id WHERE t.trade_type = 'buy' GROUP BY i.risk_profile

question: Which sector has the highest total market capitalization?
sql: SELECT i.sector, SUM(i.market_cap_cr) AS total_market_cap FROM instruments i GROUP BY i.sector ORDER BY total_market_cap DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the total quantity of each instrument traded by all investors, grouped by instrument name
sql: SELECT i.name, SUM(t.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.name

question: What is the total value of all holdings for each investor, grouped by demat account?
sql: SELECT i.demat_account, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors i ON p.investor_id = i.investor_id GROUP BY i.demat_account

question: List all instruments with their average buy price, grouped by instrument type
sql: SELECT i.instrument_type, AVG(h.avg_buy_price) AS avg_buy_price FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.instrument_type

question: Find the total brokerage paid by all investors for selling instruments, grouped by exchange
sql: SELECT i.exchange, SUM(t.brokerage) AS total_brokerage FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id WHERE t.trade_type = 'sell' GROUP BY i.exchange

question: Which investor has the highest total market value of holdings?
sql: SELECT i.full_name, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_market_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors i ON p.investor_id = i.investor_id GROUP BY i.full_name ORDER BY total_market_value DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the total quantity of each instrument held by all NRI investors, grouped by instrument name
sql: SELECT i.name, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors i2 ON p.investor_id = i2.investor_id JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id WHERE i2.is_nri = TRUE GROUP BY i.name

question: What is the average current price of each instrument type?
sql: SELECT i.instrument_type, AVG(h.current_price) AS avg_current_price FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.instrument_type

question: List all portfolios with their total brokerage paid for buying instruments, sorted by brokerage in descending order
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(t.brokerage) AS total_brokerage FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id WHERE t.trade_type = 'buy' GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY total_brokerage DESC

question: Find the total market capitalization of all instruments in each sector, grouped by sector
sql: SELECT i.sector, SUM(i.market_cap_cr) AS total_market_cap FROM instruments i GROUP BY i.sector

question: Which investor has the highest total quantity of holdings?
sql: SELECT i.full_name, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors i ON p.investor_id = i.investor_id GROUP BY i.full_name ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the total value of all trades for each instrument, grouped by instrument name
sql: SELECT i.name, SUM(t.quantity * t.price) AS total_value FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.name

question: What is the total quantity of each instrument type sold by all investors?
sql: SELECT i.instrument_type, SUM(t.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id WHERE t.trade_type = 'sell' GROUP BY i.instrument_type

question: List all instruments with their total market capitalization, sorted by market capitalization in descending order
sql: SELECT i.name, i.market_cap_cr AS total_market_cap FROM instruments i ORDER BY total_market_cap DESC

question: Find the average quantity of each instrument held by all investors, grouped by instrument name
sql: SELECT i.name, AVG(h.quantity) AS avg_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.name

question: Which exchange has the highest total market capitalization of instruments?
sql: SELECT i.exchange, SUM(i.market_cap_cr) AS total_market_cap FROM instruments i GROUP BY i.exchange ORDER BY total_market_cap DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total quantity of each instrument held by all investors?
sql: SELECT i.symbol, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.symbol

question: List all portfolios with their total market value, grouped by investor risk profile
sql: SELECT inv.risk_profile, p.name, SUM(h.current_price * h.quantity) AS total_market_value FROM portfolios p JOIN investors inv ON p.investor_id = inv.investor_id JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY inv.risk_profile, p.name

question: What are the top 5 instruments by market capitalization in each sector, along with their corresponding market capitalization and sector?
sql: WITH ranked_instruments AS (SELECT instrument_id, sector, market_cap_cr, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sector ORDER BY market_cap_cr DESC) AS row_num FROM instruments) SELECT instrument_id, sector, market_cap_cr FROM ranked_instruments WHERE row_num <= 5

question: Find the total value of all holdings for each portfolio, along with the portfolio name and creation date, ordered by total value in descending order
sql: WITH portfolio_values AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, p.name, p.created_at, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id, p.name, p.created_at) SELECT * FROM portfolio_values ORDER BY total_value DESC

question: List all investors with their corresponding risk profile and the number of portfolios they have, ordered by the number of portfolios in descending order
sql: WITH investor_portfolios AS (SELECT i.investor_id, i.risk_profile, COUNT(p.portfolio_id) AS num_portfolios FROM investors i JOIN portfolios p ON i.investor_id = p.investor_id GROUP BY i.investor_id, i.risk_profile) SELECT * FROM investor_portfolios ORDER BY num_portfolios DESC

question: Find the average buy price and current price of all holdings for each portfolio, along with the portfolio name and creation date, ordered by the average buy price in ascending order
sql: WITH portfolio_prices AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, p.name, p.created_at, AVG(h.avg_buy_price) AS avg_buy_price, AVG(h.current_price) AS avg_current_price FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id, p.name, p.created_at) SELECT * FROM portfolio_prices ORDER BY avg_buy_price ASC

question: List all instruments with their corresponding market capitalization and the rank of their market capitalization within their sector, ordered by the market capitalization in descending order
sql: WITH ranked_instruments AS (SELECT instrument_id, sector, market_cap_cr, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sector ORDER BY market_cap_cr DESC) AS rank FROM instruments) SELECT * FROM ranked_instruments ORDER BY market_cap_cr DESC

question: What are the top 3 portfolios by total value for each investor, along with the investor name and the portfolio name, ordered by the total value in descending order?
sql: WITH ranked_portfolios AS (SELECT i.investor_id, i.full_name, p.portfolio_id, p.name, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.investor_id ORDER BY SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) DESC) AS row_num FROM investors i JOIN portfolios p ON i.investor_id = p.investor_id JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY i.investor_id, i.full_name, p.portfolio_id, p.name) SELECT * FROM ranked_portfolios WHERE row_num <= 3 ORDER BY total_value DESC

question: Find the total brokerage paid for all trades for each instrument, along with the instrument name and symbol, ordered by the total brokerage in descending order
sql: WITH trade_brokerage AS (SELECT i.name, i.symbol, SUM(t.brokerage) AS total_brokerage FROM instruments i JOIN trades t ON i.instrument_id = t.instrument_id GROUP BY i.name, i.symbol) SELECT * FROM trade_brokerage ORDER BY total_brokerage DESC

question: List all investors with their corresponding risk profile and the total value of all their portfolios, ordered by the total value in descending order
sql: WITH investor_total_value AS (SELECT i.investor_id, i.risk_profile, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM investors i JOIN portfolios p ON i.investor_id = p.investor_id JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY i.investor_id, i.risk_profile) SELECT * FROM investor_total_value ORDER BY total_value DESC

question: Find the average quantity of all trades for each instrument, along with the instrument name and symbol, ordered by the average quantity in descending order
sql: WITH trade_quantity AS (SELECT i.name, i.symbol, AVG(t.quantity) AS avg_quantity FROM instruments i JOIN trades t ON i.instrument_id = t.instrument_id GROUP BY i.name, i.symbol) SELECT * FROM trade_quantity ORDER BY avg_quantity DESC

question: List all portfolios with their corresponding total value and the rank of their total value within their investor, ordered by the total value in descending order
sql: WITH ranked_portfolios AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, p.name, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.investor_id ORDER BY SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) DESC) AS rank FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id, p.name, p.investor_id) SELECT * FROM ranked_portfolios ORDER BY total_value DESC

question: Find the total value of all holdings for each portfolio, along with the portfolio name and creation date, ordered by the total value in descending order, and also include the investor name
sql: WITH portfolio_values AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, p.name, p.created_at, i.full_name AS investor_name, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM portfolios p JOIN investors i ON p.investor_id = i.investor_id JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id, p.name, p.created_at, i.full_name) SELECT * FROM portfolio_values ORDER BY total_value DESC

question: List all instruments with their corresponding market capitalization and the percentage change in market capitalization over the last month, ordered by the percentage change in descending order
sql: WITH instrument_market_cap AS (SELECT i.instrument_id, i.symbol, i.market_cap_cr, LAG(i.market_cap_cr) OVER (ORDER BY i.market_cap_cr) AS prev_month_market_cap FROM instruments i) SELECT instrument_id, symbol, market_cap_cr, ((market_cap_cr - prev_month_market_cap) / prev_month_market_cap) * 100 AS percentage_change FROM instrument_market_cap ORDER BY percentage_change DESC

question: Find the average current price of all holdings for each portfolio, along with the portfolio name and creation date, ordered by the average current price in ascending order
sql: WITH portfolio_prices AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, p.name, p.created_at, AVG(h.current_price) AS avg_current_price FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id, p.name, p.created_at) SELECT * FROM portfolio_prices ORDER BY avg_current_price ASC

question: List all investors with their corresponding risk profile and the total brokerage paid for all their trades, ordered by the total brokerage in descending order
sql: WITH investor_brokerage AS (SELECT i.investor_id, i.risk_profile, SUM(t.brokerage) AS total_brokerage FROM investors i JOIN portfolios p ON i.investor_id = p.investor_id JOIN trades t ON p.portfolio_id = t.portfolio_id GROUP BY i.investor_id, i.risk_profile) SELECT * FROM investor_brokerage ORDER BY total_brokerage DESC

question: What are the top 3 sectors by average market capitalization, along with the average market capitalization and the sector?
sql: WITH ranked_sectors AS (SELECT sector, AVG(market_cap_cr) AS avg_market_cap, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(market_cap_cr) DESC) AS row_num FROM instruments GROUP BY sector) SELECT sector, avg_market_cap FROM ranked_sectors WHERE row_num <= 3

question: Find the total quantity of all holdings for each instrument, along with the instrument name and symbol, ordered by the total quantity in descending order
sql: WITH instrument_quantity AS (SELECT i.name, i.symbol, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM instruments i JOIN holdings h ON i.instrument_id = h.instrument_id GROUP BY i.name, i.symbol) SELECT * FROM instrument_quantity ORDER BY total_quantity DESC

question: What is the total market capitalization of the top 5 instruments in each sector, ranked by their market capitalization?
sql: WITH ranked_instruments AS (SELECT sector, instrument_id, market_cap_cr, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sector ORDER BY market_cap_cr DESC) AS rank FROM instruments) SELECT sector, SUM(market_cap_cr) AS total_market_cap FROM ranked_instruments WHERE rank <= 5 GROUP BY sector

question: Find the top 3 portfolios with the highest total value of holdings for each investor, along with the total value of their holdings
sql: WITH ranked_portfolios AS (SELECT i.investor_id, p.portfolio_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY i.investor_id ORDER BY SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) DESC) AS rank FROM investors i JOIN portfolios p ON i.investor_id = p.investor_id JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY i.investor_id, p.portfolio_id) SELECT i.full_name, rp.portfolio_id, rp.total_value FROM ranked_portfolios rp JOIN investors i ON rp.investor_id = i.investor_id WHERE rank <= 3

question: What is the running total of brokerage fees for each portfolio, ordered by the traded_at timestamp?
sql: WITH running_brokerage AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, t.traded_at, t.brokerage, SUM(t.brokerage) OVER (PARTITION BY p.portfolio_id ORDER BY t.traded_at) AS running_total FROM portfolios p JOIN trades t ON p.portfolio_id = t.portfolio_id) SELECT portfolio_id, traded_at, brokerage, running_total FROM running_brokerage ORDER BY portfolio_id, traded_at

question: List the instruments that have been traded the most in the last month, along with the total quantity traded
sql: WITH recent_trades AS (SELECT instrument_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity FROM trades WHERE traded_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month' GROUP BY instrument_id) SELECT i.symbol, i.name, rt.total_quantity FROM recent_trades rt JOIN instruments i ON rt.instrument_id = i.instrument_id ORDER BY rt.total_quantity DESC LIMIT 10

question: What is the total value of holdings for each portfolio, along with the percentage of the total value that each instrument represents?
sql: WITH total_value AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id), instrument_value AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, h.instrument_id, h.quantity * h.current_price AS instrument_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id) SELECT iv.portfolio_id, i.symbol, iv.instrument_value, tv.total_value, (iv.instrument_value / tv.total_value) * 100 AS percentage FROM instrument_value iv JOIN instruments i ON iv.instrument_id = i.instrument_id JOIN total_value tv ON iv.portfolio_id = tv.portfolio_id

question: What is the month-over-month delta in the total value of holdings for each portfolio?
sql: WITH monthly_value AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', t.traded_at) AS month, SUM(t.quantity * t.price) AS total_value FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', t.traded_at)), delta AS (SELECT portfolio_id, month, total_value, LAG(total_value) OVER (PARTITION BY portfolio_id ORDER BY month) AS prev_value FROM monthly_value) SELECT portfolio_id, month, total_value, total_value - prev_value AS delta FROM delta

question: List the investors who have not traded in the last quarter, along with the total value of their holdings
sql: WITH recent_trades AS (SELECT p.investor_id FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id WHERE traded_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 month'), total_value AS (SELECT p.investor_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.investor_id) SELECT i.full_name, tv.total_value FROM investors i JOIN total_value tv ON i.investor_id = tv.investor_id WHERE i.investor_id NOT IN (SELECT investor_id FROM recent_trades)

question: What is the total brokerage fees paid by each investor in the last year, along with the average brokerage fee per trade?
sql: WITH recent_trades AS (SELECT p.investor_id, t.brokerage FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id WHERE t.traded_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year'), total_brokerage AS (SELECT investor_id, SUM(brokerage) AS total_brokerage, COUNT(*) AS num_trades FROM recent_trades GROUP BY investor_id) SELECT i.full_name, tb.total_brokerage, tb.total_brokerage / tb.num_trades AS avg_brokerage FROM total_brokerage tb JOIN investors i ON tb.investor_id = i.investor_id

question: List the portfolios that have the highest turnover ratio in the last quarter, along with the turnover ratio
sql: WITH recent_trades AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, t.quantity FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id WHERE t.traded_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 month'), total_value AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id), turnover AS (SELECT rt.portfolio_id, SUM(rt.quantity) / tv.total_value AS turnover_ratio FROM recent_trades rt JOIN total_value tv ON rt.portfolio_id = tv.portfolio_id GROUP BY rt.portfolio_id, tv.total_value) SELECT p.name, t.turnover_ratio FROM turnover t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id ORDER BY t.turnover_ratio DESC LIMIT 10

question: Find the investors who have the highest Sharpe ratio in the last year, along with the Sharpe ratio
sql: WITH recent_trades AS (SELECT p.investor_id, t.quantity, t.price FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id WHERE t.traded_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year'), total_return AS (SELECT investor_id, SUM(quantity * price) AS total_return FROM recent_trades GROUP BY investor_id), volatility AS (SELECT investor_id, STDDEV(quantity * price) AS volatility FROM recent_trades GROUP BY investor_id), sharpe_ratio AS (SELECT tr.investor_id, tr.total_return / v.volatility AS sharpe_ratio FROM total_return tr JOIN volatility v ON tr.investor_id = v.investor_id) SELECT i.full_name, sr.sharpe_ratio FROM sharpe_ratio sr JOIN investors i ON sr.investor_id = i.investor_id ORDER BY sr.sharpe_ratio DESC LIMIT 10

question: List the top 5 instruments with the highest trading volume in each sector, along with the trading volume
sql: WITH sector_volume AS (SELECT i.sector, t.instrument_id, SUM(t.quantity) AS trading_volume FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.sector, t.instrument_id), ranked_instruments AS (SELECT sector, instrument_id, trading_volume, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sector ORDER BY trading_volume DESC) AS rank FROM sector_volume) SELECT ri.sector, i.symbol, ri.trading_volume FROM ranked_instruments ri JOIN instruments i ON ri.instrument_id = i.instrument_id WHERE rank <= 5

question: What is the average daily trading volume for each instrument in each sector, along with the average daily trading volume for all instruments in the sector?
sql: WITH daily_volume AS (SELECT i.sector, t.instrument_id, DATE(t.traded_at) AS date, SUM(t.quantity) AS trading_volume FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.sector, t.instrument_id, DATE(t.traded_at)), sector_avg AS (SELECT sector, AVG(trading_volume) AS avg_trading_volume FROM daily_volume GROUP BY sector) SELECT dv.sector, i.symbol, AVG(dv.trading_volume) AS avg_daily_volume, sa.avg_trading_volume AS sector_avg FROM daily_volume dv JOIN instruments i ON dv.instrument_id = i.instrument_id JOIN sector_avg sa ON dv.sector = sa.sector GROUP BY dv.sector, i.symbol, sa.avg_trading_volume

question: List the investors who have the highest total value of holdings in each risk profile, along with the total value of their holdings
sql: WITH total_value AS (SELECT p.investor_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.investor_id), ranked_investors AS (SELECT i.risk_profile, tv.investor_id, tv.total_value, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY i.risk_profile ORDER BY tv.total_value DESC) AS rank FROM total_value tv JOIN investors i ON tv.investor_id = i.investor_id) SELECT ri.risk_profile, i.full_name, ri.total_value FROM ranked_investors ri JOIN investors i ON ri.investor_id = i.investor_id WHERE rank = 1

question: Find the instruments that have the highest volatility in each sector, along with the volatility
sql: WITH daily_return AS (SELECT i.sector, t.instrument_id, DATE(t.traded_at) AS date, t.price AS daily_price FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id), volatility AS (SELECT sector, instrument_id, STDDEV(daily_price) AS volatility FROM daily_return GROUP BY sector, instrument_id) SELECT v.sector, i.symbol, v.volatility FROM volatility v JOIN instruments i ON v.instrument_id = i.instrument_id ORDER BY v.volatility DESC LIMIT 10

question: What is the average trading volume for each portfolio in the last quarter, along with the average trading volume for all portfolios?
sql: WITH recent_trades AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, t.quantity FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id WHERE t.traded_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 month'), portfolio_avg AS (SELECT portfolio_id, AVG(quantity) AS avg_trading_volume FROM recent_trades GROUP BY portfolio_id), overall_avg AS (SELECT AVG(avg_trading_volume) AS overall_avg FROM portfolio_avg) SELECT pa.portfolio_id, p.name, pa.avg_trading_volume, oa.overall_avg FROM portfolio_avg pa JOIN portfolios p ON pa.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN overall_avg oa ON 1 = 1

question: List the top 5 instruments with the highest market capitalization in each sector, along with the market capitalization
sql: WITH ranked_instruments AS (SELECT i.sector, i.instrument_id, i.market_cap_cr, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY i.sector ORDER BY i.market_cap_cr DESC) AS rank FROM instruments i) SELECT ri.sector, i.symbol, ri.market_cap_cr FROM ranked_instruments ri JOIN instruments i ON ri.instrument_id = i.instrument_id WHERE rank <= 5

question: What is the monthly running total of trades for each instrument, considering only buy trades?
sql: WITH monthly_trades AS (SELECT instrument_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM traded_at) AS month, SUM(quantity) AS total FROM trades WHERE trade_type = 'buy' GROUP BY instrument_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM traded_at)) SELECT instrument_id, month, SUM(total) OVER (PARTITION BY instrument_id ORDER BY month) AS running_total FROM monthly_trades ORDER BY instrument_id, month

question: List the top 5 instruments by market capitalization, along with their corresponding sector and exchange
sql: WITH ranked_instruments AS (SELECT instrument_id, symbol, name, sector, exchange, market_cap_cr, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY market_cap_cr DESC) AS rank FROM instruments) SELECT instrument_id, symbol, name, sector, exchange, market_cap_cr FROM ranked_instruments WHERE rank <= 5

question: Find the investor with the highest total portfolio value, considering the current price of each holding
sql: WITH portfolio_values AS (SELECT p.investor_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.investor_id) SELECT i.full_name, pv.total_value FROM investors i JOIN portfolio_values pv ON i.investor_id = pv.investor_id ORDER BY pv.total_value DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average brokerage per trade for each instrument, considering only sell trades?
sql: WITH avg_brokerage AS (SELECT instrument_id, AVG(brokerage) AS avg_brokerage FROM trades WHERE trade_type = 'sell' GROUP BY instrument_id) SELECT i.symbol, i.name, ab.avg_brokerage FROM instruments i JOIN avg_brokerage ab ON i.instrument_id = ab.instrument_id

question: List the instruments with a market capitalization greater than the average market capitalization of their sector
sql: WITH sector_avg_market_cap AS (SELECT sector, AVG(market_cap_cr) AS avg_market_cap FROM instruments GROUP BY sector) SELECT i.instrument_id, i.symbol, i.name, i.sector, i.market_cap_cr FROM instruments i JOIN sector_avg_market_cap samc ON i.sector = samc.sector WHERE i.market_cap_cr > samc.avg_market_cap

question: Find the portfolio with the highest return on investment, considering the average buy price and current price of each holding
sql: WITH portfolio_returns AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, SUM(h.quantity * (h.current_price - h.avg_buy_price)) / SUM(h.quantity * h.avg_buy_price) AS return_on_investment FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id) SELECT p.name, pr.return_on_investment FROM portfolios p JOIN portfolio_returns pr ON p.portfolio_id = pr.portfolio_id ORDER BY pr.return_on_investment DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the cumulative sum of trades for each instrument, considering only buy trades?
sql: WITH cumulative_trades AS (SELECT instrument_id, SUM(quantity) OVER (ORDER BY trade_id) AS cumulative_sum FROM trades WHERE trade_type = 'buy') SELECT i.symbol, i.name, ct.cumulative_sum FROM instruments i JOIN cumulative_trades ct ON i.instrument_id = ct.instrument_id

question: List the top 3 sectors by average market capitalization
sql: WITH ranked_sectors AS (SELECT sector, AVG(market_cap_cr) AS avg_market_cap, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(market_cap_cr) DESC) AS rank FROM instruments GROUP BY sector) SELECT sector, avg_market_cap FROM ranked_sectors WHERE rank <= 3

question: Find the investor with the lowest total portfolio value, considering the current price of each holding
sql: WITH portfolio_values AS (SELECT p.investor_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.investor_id) SELECT i.full_name, pv.total_value FROM investors i JOIN portfolio_values pv ON i.investor_id = pv.investor_id ORDER BY pv.total_value ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the month-over-month delta in trades for each instrument, considering only buy trades?
sql: WITH monthly_trades AS (SELECT instrument_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM traded_at) AS month, SUM(quantity) AS total FROM trades WHERE trade_type = 'buy' GROUP BY instrument_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM traded_at)) SELECT instrument_id, month, total, LAG(total) OVER (PARTITION BY instrument_id ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_total, total - LAG(total) OVER (PARTITION BY instrument_id ORDER BY month) AS delta FROM monthly_trades

question: List the instruments with a higher market capitalization than the average market capitalization of all instruments
sql: WITH avg_market_cap AS (SELECT AVG(market_cap_cr) AS avg_market_cap FROM instruments) SELECT i.instrument_id, i.symbol, i.name, i.market_cap_cr FROM instruments i JOIN avg_market_cap amc ON i.market_cap_cr > amc.avg_market_cap

question: Find the portfolio with the lowest return on investment, considering the average buy price and current price of each holding
sql: WITH portfolio_returns AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, SUM(h.quantity * (h.current_price - h.avg_buy_price)) / SUM(h.quantity * h.avg_buy_price) AS return_on_investment FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id) SELECT p.name, pr.return_on_investment FROM portfolios p JOIN portfolio_returns pr ON p.portfolio_id = pr.portfolio_id ORDER BY pr.return_on_investment ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the running total of trades for each instrument, considering only sell trades?
sql: WITH sell_trades AS (SELECT instrument_id, trade_id, quantity FROM trades WHERE trade_type = 'sell') SELECT instrument_id, SUM(quantity) OVER (ORDER BY trade_id) AS running_total FROM sell_trades

question: List the top 5 investors by total portfolio value, considering the current price of each holding
sql: WITH portfolio_values AS (SELECT p.investor_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.investor_id) SELECT i.full_name, pv.total_value FROM investors i JOIN portfolio_values pv ON i.investor_id = pv.investor_id ORDER BY pv.total_value DESC LIMIT 5

question: Find the instrument with the highest average brokerage per trade, considering only sell trades
sql: WITH avg_brokerage AS (SELECT instrument_id, AVG(brokerage) AS avg_brokerage FROM trades WHERE trade_type = 'sell' GROUP BY instrument_id) SELECT i.symbol, i.name, ab.avg_brokerage FROM instruments i JOIN avg_brokerage ab ON i.instrument_id = ab.instrument_id ORDER BY ab.avg_brokerage DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the cumulative sum of trades for each instrument, considering only buy and sell trades?
sql: WITH cumulative_trades AS (SELECT instrument_id, SUM(quantity) OVER (ORDER BY trade_id) AS cumulative_sum FROM trades) SELECT i.symbol, i.name, ct.cumulative_sum FROM instruments i JOIN cumulative_trades ct ON i.instrument_id = ct.instrument_id

question: List the sectors with a higher average market capitalization than the overall average market capitalization
sql: WITH sector_avg_market_cap AS (SELECT sector, AVG(market_cap_cr) AS avg_market_cap FROM instruments GROUP BY sector), overall_avg_market_cap AS (SELECT AVG(market_cap_cr) AS avg_market_cap FROM instruments) SELECT samc.sector, samc.avg_market_cap FROM sector_avg_market_cap samc JOIN overall_avg_market_cap oamc ON samc.avg_market_cap > oamc.avg_market_cap

question: Find the investor with the highest total portfolio value, considering the average buy price and current price of each holding
sql: WITH portfolio_values AS (SELECT p.investor_id, SUM(h.quantity * (h.current_price - h.avg_buy_price)) / SUM(h.quantity * h.avg_buy_price) AS return_on_investment FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.investor_id) SELECT i.full_name, pv.return_on_investment FROM investors i JOIN portfolio_values pv ON i.investor_id = pv.investor_id ORDER BY pv.return_on_investment DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the month-over-month delta in market capitalization for each instrument?
sql: WITH monthly_market_cap AS (SELECT instrument_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) AS month, market_cap_cr AS total FROM instruments) SELECT instrument_id, month, total, LAG(total) OVER (PARTITION BY instrument_id ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_total, total - LAG(total) OVER (PARTITION BY instrument_id ORDER BY month) AS delta FROM monthly_market_cap

question: What are the top 5 instruments by market capitalization in each sector, along with their corresponding market capitalization?
sql: WITH ranked_instruments AS (SELECT sector, instrument_id, market_cap_cr, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sector ORDER BY market_cap_cr DESC) AS row_num FROM instruments) SELECT sector, instrument_id, market_cap_cr FROM ranked_instruments WHERE row_num <= 5

question: Find the running total of trades for each portfolio, including the total quantity traded and the total brokerage paid.
sql: WITH running_totals AS (SELECT portfolio_id, SUM(quantity) OVER (PARTITION BY portfolio_id ORDER BY traded_at) AS total_quantity, SUM(brokerage) OVER (PARTITION BY portfolio_id ORDER BY traded_at) AS total_brokerage FROM trades) SELECT portfolio_id, total_quantity, total_brokerage FROM running_totals

question: Which investors have a higher total portfolio value than the average total portfolio value across all investors?
sql: WITH portfolio_values AS (SELECT investor_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY investor_id), avg_value AS (SELECT AVG(total_value) AS avg_total_value FROM portfolio_values) SELECT investor_id FROM portfolio_values WHERE total_value > (SELECT avg_total_value FROM avg_value)

question: List the instruments with the highest and lowest market capitalization in each sector.
sql: WITH ranked_instruments AS (SELECT sector, instrument_id, market_cap_cr, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sector ORDER BY market_cap_cr DESC) AS row_num, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sector ORDER BY market_cap_cr ASC) AS row_num_asc FROM instruments) SELECT sector, instrument_id, market_cap_cr FROM ranked_instruments WHERE row_num = 1 OR row_num_asc = 1

question: Find the month-over-month delta in total trades for each portfolio.
sql: WITH monthly_trades AS (SELECT portfolio_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM traded_at) AS month, SUM(quantity) AS total_trades FROM trades GROUP BY portfolio_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM traded_at)), lagged_trades AS (SELECT portfolio_id, month, total_trades, LAG(total_trades) OVER (PARTITION BY portfolio_id ORDER BY month) AS prev_total_trades FROM monthly_trades) SELECT portfolio_id, month, total_trades, total_trades - prev_total_trades AS delta FROM lagged_trades

question: What are the top 3 instruments by average buy price for each portfolio?
sql: WITH ranked_instruments AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, i.instrument_id, AVG(h.avg_buy_price) AS avg_buy_price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.portfolio_id ORDER BY AVG(h.avg_buy_price) DESC) AS row_num FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id, i.instrument_id) SELECT portfolio_id, instrument_id, avg_buy_price FROM ranked_instruments WHERE row_num <= 3

question: Find the running total of brokerage paid for each portfolio, including the total brokerage paid and the average brokerage per trade.
sql: WITH running_totals AS (SELECT portfolio_id, SUM(brokerage) OVER (PARTITION BY portfolio_id ORDER BY traded_at) AS total_brokerage, AVG(brokerage) OVER (PARTITION BY portfolio_id ORDER BY traded_at) AS avg_brokerage FROM trades) SELECT portfolio_id, total_brokerage, avg_brokerage FROM running_totals

question: Which portfolios have a higher total value than the average total value across all portfolios?
sql: WITH portfolio_values AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id), avg_value AS (SELECT AVG(total_value) AS avg_total_value FROM portfolio_values) SELECT portfolio_id FROM portfolio_values WHERE total_value > (SELECT avg_total_value FROM avg_value)

question: List the instruments with the highest and lowest average buy price in each sector.
sql: WITH ranked_instruments AS (SELECT i.sector, i.instrument_id, AVG(h.avg_buy_price) AS avg_buy_price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.sector ORDER BY AVG(h.avg_buy_price) DESC) AS row_num, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.sector ORDER BY AVG(h.avg_buy_price) ASC) AS row_num_asc FROM holdings h JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.sector, i.instrument_id) SELECT sector, instrument_id, avg_buy_price FROM ranked_instruments WHERE row_num = 1 OR row_num_asc = 1

question: What are the top 5 investors by total portfolio value, along with their corresponding total portfolio value?
sql: WITH ranked_investors AS (SELECT i.investor_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) DESC) AS row_num FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors i ON p.investor_id = i.investor_id GROUP BY i.investor_id) SELECT investor_id, total_value FROM ranked_investors WHERE row_num <= 5

question: Find the running total of quantity traded for each instrument, including the total quantity traded and the average quantity per trade.
sql: WITH running_totals AS (SELECT i.instrument_id, SUM(t.quantity) OVER (PARTITION BY i.instrument_id ORDER BY t.traded_at) AS total_quantity, AVG(t.quantity) OVER (PARTITION BY i.instrument_id ORDER BY t.traded_at) AS avg_quantity FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id) SELECT instrument_id, total_quantity, avg_quantity FROM running_totals

question: Which instruments have a higher market capitalization than the average market capitalization across all instruments?
sql: WITH instrument_values AS (SELECT instrument_id, market_cap_cr AS value FROM instruments), avg_value AS (SELECT AVG(value) AS avg_value FROM instrument_values) SELECT instrument_id FROM instrument_values WHERE value > (SELECT avg_value FROM avg_value)

question: List the investors with the highest and lowest total portfolio value.
sql: WITH ranked_investors AS (SELECT i.investor_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) DESC) AS row_num, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) ASC) AS row_num_asc FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id JOIN investors i ON p.investor_id = i.investor_id GROUP BY i.investor_id) SELECT investor_id, total_value FROM ranked_investors WHERE row_num = 1 OR row_num_asc = 1

question: Find the month-over-month delta in total brokerage paid for each portfolio.
sql: WITH monthly_brokerage AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t.traded_at) AS month, SUM(t.brokerage) AS total_brokerage FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t.traded_at)), lagged_brokerage AS (SELECT portfolio_id, month, total_brokerage, LAG(total_brokerage) OVER (PARTITION BY portfolio_id ORDER BY month) AS prev_total_brokerage FROM monthly_brokerage) SELECT portfolio_id, month, total_brokerage, total_brokerage - prev_total_brokerage AS delta FROM lagged_brokerage

question: What are the top 3 portfolios by total value for each investor, along with their corresponding total value?
sql: WITH ranked_portfolios AS (SELECT p.investor_id, p.portfolio_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.investor_id ORDER BY SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) DESC) AS row_num FROM holdings h JOIN portfolios p ON h.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.investor_id, p.portfolio_id) SELECT investor_id, portfolio_id, total_value FROM ranked_portfolios WHERE row_num <= 3

question: Find the running total of trades for each instrument, including the total quantity traded and the average quantity per trade.
sql: WITH running_totals AS (SELECT i.instrument_id, SUM(t.quantity) OVER (PARTITION BY i.instrument_id ORDER BY t.traded_at) AS total_quantity, AVG(t.quantity) OVER (PARTITION BY i.instrument_id ORDER BY t.traded_at) AS avg_quantity FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id) SELECT instrument_id, total_quantity, avg_quantity FROM running_totals

question: Which portfolios have a higher total brokerage paid than the average total brokerage paid across all portfolios?
sql: WITH portfolio_brokerage AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, SUM(t.brokerage) AS total_brokerage FROM trades t JOIN portfolios p ON t.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id), avg_brokerage AS (SELECT AVG(total_brokerage) AS avg_total_brokerage FROM portfolio_brokerage) SELECT portfolio_id FROM portfolio_brokerage WHERE total_brokerage > (SELECT avg_total_brokerage FROM avg_brokerage)

question: List the instruments with the highest and lowest average quantity traded.
sql: WITH ranked_instruments AS (SELECT i.instrument_id, AVG(t.quantity) AS avg_quantity, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(t.quantity) DESC) AS row_num, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(t.quantity) ASC) AS row_num_asc FROM trades t JOIN instruments i ON t.instrument_id = i.instrument_id GROUP BY i.instrument_id) SELECT instrument_id, avg_quantity FROM ranked_instruments WHERE row_num = 1 OR row_num_asc = 1

question: What are the top 3 instruments by average buy price for each portfolio, considering only the instruments with a market capitalization of over 1000 crores?
sql: WITH ranked_instruments AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, i.instrument_id, i.name, h.avg_buy_price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.portfolio_id ORDER BY h.avg_buy_price DESC) AS rank FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id WHERE i.market_cap_cr > 1000) SELECT portfolio_id, instrument_id, name, avg_buy_price FROM ranked_instruments WHERE rank <= 3

question: Find the portfolio with the highest total brokerage paid for buy trades in the last 30 days, along with the total brokerage amount and the number of trades
sql: WITH recent_trades AS (SELECT portfolio_id, SUM(brokerage) AS total_brokerage, COUNT(trade_id) AS num_trades FROM trades WHERE trade_type = 'buy' AND traded_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY portfolio_id) SELECT portfolio_id, total_brokerage, num_trades FROM recent_trades ORDER BY total_brokerage DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all investors who have a portfolio with a holding that has a current price greater than the average buy price, and show the difference between the current price and the average buy price for each holding
sql: WITH profitable_holdings AS (SELECT p.investor_id, h.instrument_id, h.current_price - h.avg_buy_price AS profit FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id WHERE h.current_price > h.avg_buy_price) SELECT DISTINCT i.investor_id, i.full_name, ph.instrument_id, ph.profit FROM profitable_holdings ph JOIN investors i ON ph.investor_id = i.investor_id

question: What is the running total of the market capitalization of all instruments in each sector, ordered by sector and market capitalization?
sql: WITH sector_market_cap AS (SELECT sector, SUM(market_cap_cr) AS total_market_cap FROM instruments GROUP BY sector) SELECT sector, total_market_cap, SUM(total_market_cap) OVER (ORDER BY total_market_cap) AS running_total FROM sector_market_cap ORDER BY sector, total_market_cap

question: Find the top 5 instruments by quantity traded in the last 7 days, considering only buy trades, and show the total quantity traded and the average price
sql: WITH recent_buy_trades AS (SELECT instrument_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity, AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM trades WHERE trade_type = 'buy' AND traded_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY instrument_id) SELECT instrument_id, total_quantity, avg_price FROM recent_buy_trades ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the month-over-month delta in the total market capitalization of all instruments in each sector, considering only the last 3 months?
sql: WITH monthly_sector_market_cap AS (SELECT sector, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM traded_at) AS month, SUM(market_cap_cr) AS total_market_cap FROM trades JOIN instruments ON trades.instrument_id = instruments.instrument_id WHERE traded_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 months' GROUP BY sector, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM traded_at)) SELECT sector, month, total_market_cap, total_market_cap - LAG(total_market_cap) OVER (PARTITION BY sector ORDER BY month) AS delta FROM monthly_sector_market_cap ORDER BY sector, month

question: List all portfolios with a holding that has a quantity greater than the average quantity of all holdings in the same portfolio, and show the instrument name and the difference between the quantity and the average quantity
sql: WITH avg_portfolio_quantity AS (SELECT portfolio_id, AVG(quantity) AS avg_quantity FROM holdings GROUP BY portfolio_id) SELECT p.portfolio_id, i.name, h.quantity - apq.avg_quantity AS quantity_diff FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id JOIN instruments i ON h.instrument_id = i.instrument_id JOIN avg_portfolio_quantity apq ON p.portfolio_id = apq.portfolio_id WHERE h.quantity > apq.avg_quantity

question: Find the investor with the highest total value of all holdings in their portfolios, considering only the current price, and show the total value and the number of holdings
sql: WITH investor_holdings AS (SELECT i.investor_id, SUM(h.quantity * h.current_price) AS total_value, COUNT(h.holding_id) AS num_holdings FROM investors i JOIN portfolios p ON i.investor_id = p.investor_id JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY i.investor_id) SELECT investor_id, total_value, num_holdings FROM investor_holdings ORDER BY total_value DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the top 3 sectors by average market capitalization of all instruments in each sector, considering only the instruments with a market capitalization of over 500 crores?
sql: WITH ranked_sectors AS (SELECT sector, AVG(market_cap_cr) AS avg_market_cap, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(market_cap_cr) DESC) AS rank FROM instruments WHERE market_cap_cr > 500 GROUP BY sector) SELECT sector, avg_market_cap FROM ranked_sectors WHERE rank <= 3

question: Find the portfolio with the lowest total brokerage paid for sell trades in the last 30 days, along with the total brokerage amount and the number of trades
sql: WITH recent_trades AS (SELECT portfolio_id, SUM(brokerage) AS total_brokerage, COUNT(trade_id) AS num_trades FROM trades WHERE trade_type = 'sell' AND traded_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY portfolio_id) SELECT portfolio_id, total_brokerage, num_trades FROM recent_trades ORDER BY total_brokerage ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the running total of the quantity of all holdings in each portfolio, ordered by portfolio and quantity?
sql: WITH portfolio_holdings AS (SELECT p.portfolio_id, SUM(h.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM portfolios p JOIN holdings h ON p.portfolio_id = h.portfolio_id GROUP BY p.portfolio_id) SELECT portfolio_id, total_quantity, SUM(total_quantity) OVER (ORDER BY total_quantity) AS running_total FROM portfolio_holdings ORDER BY portfolio_id, total_quantity

question: How many loans have an outstanding amount greater than $5000?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE outstanding > 5000.00

question: What is the average credit score of all borrowers?
sql: SELECT AVG(credit_score) FROM borrowers

question: List all borrowers who have a credit score above 800
sql: SELECT full_name FROM borrowers WHERE credit_score > 800

question: Find the maximum loan amount that can be borrowed from the 'Personal Loan' product
sql: SELECT MAX(max_amount) FROM loan_products WHERE name = 'Personal Loan'

question: How many loan applications were approved?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loan_applications WHERE status = 'Approved'

question: Show me all loan products with an interest rate below 10%
sql: SELECT name FROM loan_products WHERE interest_rate_pct < 10.00

question: What is the total number of repayments made?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repayments

question: What is the total amount disbursed for each loan product?
sql: SELECT lp.name, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.name

question: List all borrowers who have taken a loan with an interest rate above 15%
sql: SELECT b.full_name FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE lp.interest_rate_pct > 15

question: Find the average credit score of borrowers who have repaid their loans on time
sql: SELECT AVG(b.credit_score) AS avg_credit_score FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id JOIN repayments r ON l.loan_id = r.loan_id WHERE r.status = 'paid' AND r.paid_date = r.due_date

question: Show me the total outstanding amount for each city
sql: SELECT b.city, SUM(l.outstanding) AS total_outstanding FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY b.city

question: Which loan products have the highest average disbursed amount?
sql: SELECT lp.name, AVG(l.disbursed_amount) AS avg_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.name ORDER BY avg_disbursed DESC

question: What is the total number of loans disbursed for each employment type?
sql: SELECT b.employment_type, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS total_loans FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY b.employment_type

question: List all borrowers who have a loan with an outstanding amount above 10000
sql: SELECT b.full_name FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id WHERE l.outstanding > 10000

question: Find the average annual income of borrowers who have taken a loan with a tenure above 24 months
sql: SELECT AVG(b.annual_income) AS avg_annual_income FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id WHERE la.requested_tenure > 24

question: Show me the total disbursed amount for each loan product type
sql: SELECT lp.product_type, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.product_type

question: Which borrowers have the highest credit score and have taken a loan?
sql: SELECT b.full_name, b.credit_score FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id ORDER BY b.credit_score DESC

question: What is the total number of repayments made for each loan?
sql: SELECT l.loan_id, COUNT(r.repayment_id) AS total_repayments FROM loans l JOIN repayments r ON l.loan_id = r.loan_id GROUP BY l.loan_id

question: List all loan products with an interest rate below 10% and a minimum amount above 5000
sql: SELECT lp.name FROM loan_products lp WHERE lp.interest_rate_pct < 10 AND lp.min_amount > 5000

question: Find the average EMI amount for each loan product
sql: SELECT lp.name, AVG(l.emi_amount) AS avg_emi FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.name

question: Show me the total outstanding amount for each loan product type
sql: SELECT lp.product_type, SUM(l.outstanding) AS total_outstanding FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.product_type

question: Which borrowers have the lowest credit score and have taken a loan?
sql: SELECT b.full_name, b.credit_score FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id ORDER BY b.credit_score ASC

question: What is the total number of loans disbursed for each loan product?
sql: SELECT lp.name, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS total_loans FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.name

question: List all borrowers who have a loan with a DPD above 30
sql: SELECT b.full_name FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id WHERE l.dpd > 30

question: Find the average disbursed amount for each employment type
sql: SELECT b.employment_type, AVG(l.disbursed_amount) AS avg_disbursed FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY b.employment_type

question: Show me the total number of loans disbursed for each city and employment type
sql: SELECT b.city, b.employment_type, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS total_loans FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY b.city, b.employment_type

question: What is the total amount disbursed for each loan product?
sql: SELECT lp.name, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.name

question: List the borrowers with their total loan amount and average credit score, grouped by employment type
sql: SELECT b.employment_type, SUM(la.requested_amount) AS total_loan_amount, AVG(b.credit_score) AS avg_credit_score FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id GROUP BY b.employment_type

question: Find the total number of loans and total disbursed amount for each city
sql: SELECT b.city, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS total_loans, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id GROUP BY b.city

question: What is the average interest rate for loans with a tenure of more than 12 months?
sql: SELECT AVG(lp.interest_rate_pct) AS avg_interest_rate FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE la.requested_tenure > 12

question: List the loan products with their total disbursed amount and number of loans, grouped by product type
sql: SELECT lp.product_type, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS total_loans FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.product_type

question: Find the total amount repaid and total amount due for each loan
sql: SELECT l.loan_id, SUM(r.paid_amount) AS total_repaid, SUM(r.due_amount) AS total_due FROM loans l JOIN repayments r ON l.loan_id = r.loan_id GROUP BY l.loan_id

question: What is the average annual income of borrowers with a credit score above 600?
sql: SELECT AVG(b.annual_income) AS avg_annual_income FROM borrowers b WHERE b.credit_score > 600

question: List the borrowers with their total loan amount and average requested tenure, grouped by city
sql: SELECT b.city, SUM(la.requested_amount) AS total_loan_amount, AVG(la.requested_tenure) AS avg_requested_tenure FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id GROUP BY b.city

question: Find the total number of loans and total disbursed amount for each employment type
sql: SELECT b.employment_type, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS total_loans, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id GROUP BY b.employment_type

question: What is the total amount disbursed for loans with a status of 'approved'?
sql: SELECT SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id WHERE la.status = 'approved'

question: List the loan products with their total disbursed amount and number of loans, grouped by interest rate
sql: SELECT lp.interest_rate_pct, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS total_loans FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.interest_rate_pct

question: Find the total amount repaid and total amount due for each repayment mode
sql: SELECT r.payment_mode, SUM(r.paid_amount) AS total_repaid, SUM(r.due_amount) AS total_due FROM repayments r GROUP BY r.payment_mode

question: What is the average credit score of borrowers with a loan amount above 10000?
sql: SELECT AVG(b.credit_score) AS avg_credit_score FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id WHERE la.requested_amount > 10000

question: List the borrowers with their total loan amount and average disbursed amount, grouped by employment type
sql: SELECT b.employment_type, SUM(la.requested_amount) AS total_loan_amount, AVG(l.disbursed_amount) AS avg_disbursed_amount FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY b.employment_type

question: Find the total number of loans and total disbursed amount for each loan product
sql: SELECT lp.name, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS total_loans, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.name

question: What is the total amount disbursed for loans with a tenure of more than 24 months?
sql: SELECT SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id WHERE la.requested_tenure > 24

question: List the loan products with their total disbursed amount and number of loans, grouped by max tenure
sql: SELECT lp.max_tenure_months, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS total_loans FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.max_tenure_months

question: Find the total amount repaid and total amount due for each loan status
sql: SELECT la.status, SUM(r.paid_amount) AS total_repaid, SUM(r.due_amount) AS total_due FROM repayments r JOIN loans l ON r.loan_id = l.loan_id JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id GROUP BY la.status

question: What is the average annual income of borrowers with a loan amount above 5000?
sql: SELECT AVG(b.annual_income) AS avg_annual_income FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id WHERE la.requested_amount > 5000

question: What is the total amount disbursed for each loan product?
sql: SELECT lp.name, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.name

question: List all borrowers with their total outstanding loan amount
sql: SELECT b.full_name, SUM(l.outstanding) AS total_outstanding FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY b.full_name

question: Find the average credit score of borrowers for each employment type
sql: SELECT b.employment_type, AVG(b.credit_score) AS avg_credit_score FROM borrowers b GROUP BY b.employment_type

question: Show me the total repayment amount for each payment mode
sql: SELECT r.payment_mode, SUM(r.paid_amount) AS total_repayment FROM repayments r GROUP BY r.payment_mode

question: What is the count of loan applications by status?
sql: SELECT la.status, COUNT(la.application_id) AS application_count FROM loan_applications la GROUP BY la.status

question: List all loan products with their average interest rate
sql: SELECT lp.name, AVG(lp.interest_rate_pct) AS avg_interest_rate FROM loan_products lp GROUP BY lp.name

question: Find the total disbursed amount for loans with a specific product type
sql: SELECT SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE lp.product_type = 'Personal'

question: Show me the count of borrowers by city
sql: SELECT b.city, COUNT(b.borrower_id) AS borrower_count FROM borrowers b GROUP BY b.city

question: What is the average annual income of borrowers for each credit score range?
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN b.credit_score < 500 THEN 'Low' WHEN b.credit_score < 700 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'High' END AS credit_score_range, AVG(b.annual_income) AS avg_annual_income FROM borrowers b GROUP BY credit_score_range

question: List all loan applications with their corresponding loan status
sql: SELECT la.application_id, la.status, l.npa_flag AS loan_status FROM loan_applications la LEFT JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id

question: Find the total repayment amount for loans with a specific borrower
sql: SELECT SUM(r.paid_amount) AS total_repayment FROM repayments r JOIN loans l ON r.loan_id = l.loan_id JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id WHERE b.full_name = 'John Doe'

question: Show me the count of loan products by interest rate range
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN lp.interest_rate_pct < 10 THEN 'Low' WHEN lp.interest_rate_pct < 15 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'High' END AS interest_rate_range, COUNT(lp.product_id) AS product_count FROM loan_products lp GROUP BY interest_rate_range

question: List all borrowers with their corresponding credit score range
sql: SELECT b.full_name, CASE WHEN b.credit_score < 500 THEN 'Low' WHEN b.credit_score < 700 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'High' END AS credit_score_range FROM borrowers b

question: Find the total disbursed amount for loans with a specific employment type
sql: SELECT SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id WHERE b.employment_type = 'Salaried'

question: Show me the count of loan applications by applied month
sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM la.applied_at) AS applied_month, COUNT(la.application_id) AS application_count FROM loan_applications la GROUP BY applied_month

question: What is the average outstanding amount for loans with a specific DPD range?
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN l.dpd < 30 THEN 'Low' WHEN l.dpd < 60 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'High' END AS dpd_range, AVG(l.outstanding) AS avg_outstanding FROM loans l GROUP BY dpd_range

question: List all loan products with their corresponding product type
sql: SELECT lp.name, lp.product_type FROM loan_products lp

question: Find the total repayment amount for loans with a specific borrower and payment mode
