sql: SELECT SUM(r.paid_amount) AS total_repayment FROM repayments r JOIN loans l ON r.loan_id = l.loan_id JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id WHERE b.full_name = 'Jane Doe' AND r.payment_mode = 'Online'

question: Show me the count of borrowers by annual income range
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN b.annual_income < 50000 THEN 'Low' WHEN b.annual_income < 100000 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'High' END AS annual_income_range, COUNT(b.borrower_id) AS borrower_count FROM borrowers b GROUP BY annual_income_range

question: What is the total amount disbursed for each loan product?
sql: SELECT lp.name, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loan_products lp JOIN loan_applications la ON lp.product_id = la.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.name

question: List all borrowers with their total loan amount and average credit score, grouped by employment type
sql: SELECT b.employment_type, SUM(la.requested_amount) AS total_loan_amount, AVG(b.credit_score) AS avg_credit_score FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id GROUP BY b.employment_type

question: Find the total repayment amount for each loan, grouped by payment mode
sql: SELECT l.loan_id, r.payment_mode, SUM(r.paid_amount) AS total_repayment FROM loans l JOIN repayments r ON l.loan_id = r.loan_id GROUP BY l.loan_id, r.payment_mode

question: Show me the average interest rate for each loan product, grouped by product type
sql: SELECT lp.product_type, AVG(lp.interest_rate_pct) AS avg_interest_rate FROM loan_products lp GROUP BY lp.product_type

question: What is the total outstanding amount for each borrower, grouped by city?
sql: SELECT b.city, SUM(l.outstanding) AS total_outstanding FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY b.city

question: List all loan products with their minimum and maximum amounts, grouped by product type
sql: SELECT lp.product_type, MIN(lp.min_amount) AS min_amount, MAX(lp.max_amount) AS max_amount FROM loan_products lp GROUP BY lp.product_type

question: Find the total disbursed amount for each loan application status, grouped by product type
sql: SELECT la.status, lp.product_type, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY la.status, lp.product_type

question: What is the average EMI amount for each loan product, grouped by product type?
sql: SELECT lp.product_type, AVG(l.emi_amount) AS avg_emi_amount FROM loan_products lp JOIN loan_applications la ON lp.product_id = la.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.product_type

question: Show me the total repayment amount for each borrower, grouped by employment type
sql: SELECT b.employment_type, SUM(r.paid_amount) AS total_repayment FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id JOIN repayments r ON l.loan_id = r.loan_id GROUP BY b.employment_type

question: List all borrowers with their total loan amount and average annual income, grouped by city
sql: SELECT b.city, SUM(la.requested_amount) AS total_loan_amount, AVG(b.annual_income) AS avg_annual_income FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id GROUP BY b.city

question: Find the total outstanding amount for each loan product, grouped by product type
sql: SELECT lp.product_type, SUM(l.outstanding) AS total_outstanding FROM loan_products lp JOIN loan_applications la ON lp.product_id = la.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.product_type

question: What is the average credit score for each loan application status, grouped by employment type?
sql: SELECT la.status, b.employment_type, AVG(b.credit_score) AS avg_credit_score FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id GROUP BY la.status, b.employment_type

question: Show me the total disbursed amount for each borrower, grouped by employment type
sql: SELECT b.employment_type, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY b.employment_type

question: List all loan products with their total repayment amount, grouped by product type
sql: SELECT lp.product_type, SUM(r.paid_amount) AS total_repayment FROM loan_products lp JOIN loan_applications la ON lp.product_id = la.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id JOIN repayments r ON l.loan_id = r.loan_id GROUP BY lp.product_type

question: Find the average annual income for each loan product, grouped by product type
sql: SELECT lp.product_type, AVG(b.annual_income) AS avg_annual_income FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.product_type

question: What is the total loan amount for each borrower, grouped by city?
sql: SELECT b.city, SUM(la.requested_amount) AS total_loan_amount FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id GROUP BY b.city

question: Show me the average EMI amount for each loan, grouped by payment mode
sql: SELECT r.payment_mode, AVG(l.emi_amount) AS avg_emi_amount FROM loans l JOIN repayments r ON l.loan_id = r.loan_id GROUP BY r.payment_mode

question: List all borrowers with their total repayment amount and average credit score, grouped by employment type
sql: SELECT b.employment_type, SUM(r.paid_amount) AS total_repayment, AVG(b.credit_score) AS avg_credit_score FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id JOIN repayments r ON l.loan_id = r.loan_id GROUP BY b.employment_type

question: Find the total outstanding amount for each loan application status, grouped by product type
sql: SELECT la.status, lp.product_type, SUM(l.outstanding) AS total_outstanding FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY la.status, lp.product_type

question: What is the average interest rate for each loan product, grouped by min and max amounts?
sql: SELECT lp.min_amount, lp.max_amount, AVG(lp.interest_rate_pct) AS avg_interest_rate FROM loan_products lp GROUP BY lp.min_amount, lp.max_amount

question: What is the total disbursed amount for each loan product, sorted by product name?
sql: SELECT lp.name, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.name ORDER BY lp.name

question: List all borrowers who have taken a loan with an outstanding amount greater than 50000, along with their credit score and loan details
sql: SELECT b.full_name, b.credit_score, l.disbursed_amount, l.outstanding FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id WHERE l.outstanding > 50000

question: Find the average annual income of borrowers who have applied for a loan with a requested amount greater than 200000
sql: SELECT AVG(b.annual_income) AS avg_income FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id WHERE la.requested_amount > 200000

question: What are the top 5 loan products with the highest average disbursed amount per borrower, along with their corresponding average credit score?
sql: WITH ranked_products AS (SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, AVG(l.disbursed_amount) AS avg_disbursed, AVG(b.credit_score) AS avg_credit_score FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name ORDER BY avg_disbursed DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT * FROM ranked_products

question: Find the borrowers who have taken loans with the same product more than once, along with the count of such instances and the total disbursed amount for each product
sql: WITH repeated_borrowers AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, lp.product_id, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS count, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY b.borrower_id, lp.product_id HAVING COUNT(l.loan_id) > 1) SELECT * FROM repeated_borrowers

question: What is the running total of disbursed loans per month, along with the month-over-month delta?
sql: WITH monthly_disbursed AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', l.disbursed_at) AS month, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', l.disbursed_at)) SELECT month, total_disbursed, total_disbursed - LAG(total_disbursed) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS delta FROM monthly_disbursed ORDER BY month

question: Find the top 10 borrowers with the highest total outstanding amount across all their loans, along with their credit score and annual income
sql: WITH ranked_borrowers AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, b.full_name, b.credit_score, b.annual_income, SUM(l.outstanding) AS total_outstanding FROM borrowers b JOIN loans l ON b.borrower_id = l.application_id JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id GROUP BY b.borrower_id, b.full_name, b.credit_score, b.annual_income ORDER BY total_outstanding DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT * FROM ranked_borrowers

question: What are the loan products with an average disbursed amount greater than the overall average disbursed amount across all products?
sql: WITH avg_disbursed AS (SELECT AVG(l.disbursed_amount) AS overall_avg FROM loans l), product_avg AS (SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, AVG(l.disbursed_amount) AS avg_disbursed FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name) SELECT * FROM product_avg WHERE avg_disbursed > (SELECT overall_avg FROM avg_disbursed)

question: What is the month-over-month delta in the number of loan applications, along with the running total of applications?
sql: WITH monthly_applications AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', la.applied_at) AS month, COUNT(la.application_id) AS num_applications FROM loan_applications la GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', la.applied_at)) SELECT month, num_applications, SUM(num_applications) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS running_total, num_applications - LAG(num_applications) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS delta FROM monthly_applications ORDER BY month

question: Find the loan products with the highest average credit score of borrowers who have taken loans with that product
sql: WITH product_avg_credit AS (SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, AVG(b.credit_score) AS avg_credit FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name) SELECT * FROM product_avg_credit ORDER BY avg_credit DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the borrowers who have taken loans with a disbursed amount greater than their annual income?
sql: WITH high_disbursed AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, b.full_name, b.annual_income, l.disbursed_amount FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id WHERE l.disbursed_amount > b.annual_income) SELECT * FROM high_disbursed

question: Find the loan products with the lowest average DPD (days past due) across all loans disbursed under that product
sql: WITH product_avg_dpd AS (SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, AVG(l.dpd) AS avg_dpd FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name) SELECT * FROM product_avg_dpd ORDER BY avg_dpd ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the cumulative sum of disbursed loans per quarter, along with the quarter-over-quarter delta?
sql: WITH quarterly_disbursed AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('quarter', l.disbursed_at) AS quarter, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('quarter', l.disbursed_at)) SELECT quarter, total_disbursed, SUM(total_disbursed) OVER (ORDER BY quarter) AS cumulative_sum, total_disbursed - LAG(total_disbursed) OVER (ORDER BY quarter) AS delta FROM quarterly_disbursed ORDER BY quarter

question: Find the borrowers who have taken loans with a credit score less than 500, along with the total disbursed amount and the number of loans taken
sql: WITH low_credit AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, b.full_name, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS num_loans FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id WHERE b.credit_score < 500 GROUP BY b.borrower_id, b.full_name) SELECT * FROM low_credit

question: What are the loan products with an average outstanding amount greater than the overall average outstanding amount across all products?
sql: WITH avg_outstanding AS (SELECT AVG(l.outstanding) AS overall_avg FROM loans l), product_avg AS (SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, AVG(l.outstanding) AS avg_outstanding FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name) SELECT * FROM product_avg WHERE avg_outstanding > (SELECT overall_avg FROM avg_outstanding)

question: What is the year-over-year delta in the number of loan applications, along with the running total of applications?
sql: WITH yearly_applications AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('year', la.applied_at) AS year, COUNT(la.application_id) AS num_applications FROM loan_applications la GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('year', la.applied_at)) SELECT year, num_applications, SUM(num_applications) OVER (ORDER BY year) AS running_total, num_applications - LAG(num_applications) OVER (ORDER BY year) AS delta FROM yearly_applications ORDER BY year

question: Find the loan products with the highest average EMI amount across all loans disbursed under that product
sql: WITH product_avg_emi AS (SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, AVG(l.emi_amount) AS avg_emi FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name) SELECT * FROM product_avg_emi ORDER BY avg_emi DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the loan products with the lowest average credit score of borrowers who have taken loans with that product
sql: WITH product_avg_credit AS (SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, AVG(b.credit_score) AS avg_credit FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name) SELECT * FROM product_avg_credit ORDER BY avg_credit ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the cumulative sum of disbursed loans per month, along with the month-over-month delta, and rank the months by the cumulative sum in descending order?
sql: WITH monthly_disbursed AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', l.disbursed_at) AS month, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', l.disbursed_at)), cumulative_sum AS (SELECT month, total_disbursed, SUM(total_disbursed) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS cumulative_sum, total_disbursed - LAG(total_disbursed) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS delta FROM monthly_disbursed), ranked_months AS (SELECT month, cumulative_sum, delta, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cumulative_sum DESC) AS rank FROM cumulative_sum) SELECT * FROM ranked_months

question: Find the borrowers who have taken loans with a disbursed amount greater than their annual income, along with the total disbursed amount and the number of loans taken, and rank them by the total disbursed amount in descending order
sql: WITH high_disbursed AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, b.full_name, b.annual_income, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS num_loans FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id WHERE l.disbursed_amount > b.annual_income GROUP BY b.borrower_id, b.full_name, b.annual_income), ranked_borrowers AS (SELECT borrower_id, full_name, annual_income, total_disbursed, num_loans, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_disbursed DESC) AS rank FROM high_disbursed) SELECT * FROM ranked_borrowers

question: What is the top 5 loan products by average disbursed amount, considering only loans that were disbursed in the last 6 months?
sql: WITH recent_loans AS (SELECT la.product_id, l.disbursed_amount FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id WHERE l.disbursed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 month') SELECT lp.name, AVG(r.disbursed_amount) AS avg_disbursed_amount FROM recent_loans r JOIN loan_products lp ON r.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.name ORDER BY avg_disbursed_amount DESC LIMIT 5

question: Show me the running total of outstanding loan amounts for each borrower, ordered by the borrower's credit score in descending order
sql: WITH loan_outstanding AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, l.outstanding, b.credit_score FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id) SELECT borrower_id, outstanding, SUM(outstanding) OVER (ORDER BY credit_score DESC) AS running_total FROM loan_outstanding ORDER BY credit_score DESC

question: Find the loan applications that were rejected due to low credit score, and rank them by the credit score in ascending order
sql: WITH rejected_applications AS (SELECT la.application_id, b.credit_score FROM loan_applications la JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id WHERE la.rejection_reason = 'Low credit score') SELECT application_id, credit_score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY credit_score ASC) AS rank FROM rejected_applications

question: What is the month-over-month delta in the average disbursed amount for each loan product?
sql: WITH monthly_disbursed AS (SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM l.disbursed_at) AS month, lp.product_id, AVG(l.disbursed_amount) AS avg_disbursed_amount FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM l.disbursed_at), lp.product_id) SELECT product_id, month, avg_disbursed_amount, LAG(avg_disbursed_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_avg FROM monthly_disbursed

question: List all borrowers who have multiple loan applications with different loan products, and show the count of loan applications for each borrower
sql: WITH borrower_applications AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, la.product_id FROM loan_applications la JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id) SELECT borrower_id, COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) AS application_count FROM borrower_applications GROUP BY borrower_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) > 1

question: Find the top 3 borrowers with the highest total outstanding loan amount, considering only loans that are not non-performing assets
sql: WITH borrower_outstanding AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, SUM(l.outstanding) AS total_outstanding FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id WHERE l.npa_flag = FALSE GROUP BY b.borrower_id) SELECT borrower_id, total_outstanding FROM borrower_outstanding ORDER BY total_outstanding DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the average credit score of borrowers who have taken loans with an interest rate greater than 15%?
sql: WITH high_interest_loans AS (SELECT la.borrower_id, lp.interest_rate_pct FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE lp.interest_rate_pct > 15) SELECT AVG(b.credit_score) AS avg_credit_score FROM high_interest_loans hil JOIN borrowers b ON hil.borrower_id = b.borrower_id

question: Show me the loan repayment history for each borrower, including the due date, paid date, and paid amount
sql: WITH borrower_repayments AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, r.due_date, r.paid_date, r.paid_amount FROM repayments r JOIN loans l ON r.loan_id = l.loan_id JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id) SELECT borrower_id, due_date, paid_date, paid_amount FROM borrower_repayments ORDER BY borrower_id, due_date

question: What is the total outstanding loan amount for each loan product, considering only loans that are not non-performing assets?
sql: WITH product_outstanding AS (SELECT lp.product_id, l.outstanding FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE l.npa_flag = FALSE) SELECT product_id, SUM(outstanding) AS total_outstanding FROM product_outstanding GROUP BY product_id

question: List all borrowers who have taken loans with a loan amount greater than their annual income, and show the loan amount and annual income for each borrower
sql: WITH borrower_loans AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, l.disbursed_amount, b.annual_income FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id) SELECT borrower_id, disbursed_amount, annual_income FROM borrower_loans WHERE disbursed_amount > annual_income

question: Find the top 5 loan products by total disbursed amount, considering only loans that were disbursed in the last quarter
sql: WITH recent_loans AS (SELECT la.product_id, l.disbursed_amount FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id WHERE l.disbursed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 month') SELECT lp.name, SUM(r.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM recent_loans r JOIN loan_products lp ON r.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.name ORDER BY total_disbursed DESC LIMIT 5

question: Show me the loan application history for each borrower, including the application date, decision date, and status
sql: WITH borrower_applications AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, la.applied_at, la.decision_at, la.status FROM loan_applications la JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id) SELECT borrower_id, applied_at, decision_at, status FROM borrower_applications ORDER BY borrower_id, applied_at

question: Find the loan products that have the highest average loan amount, considering only loans that were disbursed in the last year
sql: WITH recent_loans AS (SELECT la.product_id, l.disbursed_amount FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id WHERE l.disbursed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year') SELECT lp.name, AVG(r.disbursed_amount) AS avg_loan_amount FROM recent_loans r JOIN loan_products lp ON r.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.name ORDER BY avg_loan_amount DESC

question: What is the total outstanding loan amount for each borrower, considering only loans that are not non-performing assets?
sql: WITH borrower_outstanding AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, l.outstanding FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id WHERE l.npa_flag = FALSE) SELECT borrower_id, SUM(outstanding) AS total_outstanding FROM borrower_outstanding GROUP BY borrower_id

question: List all loan applications that were rejected due to low income, and show the borrower's income and the loan amount for each application
sql: WITH rejected_applications AS (SELECT la.application_id, b.annual_income, la.requested_amount FROM loan_applications la JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id WHERE la.rejection_reason = 'Low income') SELECT application_id, annual_income, requested_amount FROM rejected_applications

question: Find the top 3 borrowers with the highest total loan amount, considering only loans that were disbursed in the last quarter
sql: WITH recent_loans AS (SELECT la.borrower_id, l.disbursed_amount FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id WHERE l.disbursed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 month') SELECT borrower_id, SUM(disbursed_amount) AS total_loan_amount FROM recent_loans GROUP BY borrower_id ORDER BY total_loan_amount DESC LIMIT 3

question: Show me the loan repayment schedule for each loan, including the due date, paid date, and paid amount
sql: WITH loan_repayments AS (SELECT l.loan_id, r.due_date, r.paid_date, r.paid_amount FROM repayments r JOIN loans l ON r.loan_id = l.loan_id) SELECT loan_id, due_date, paid_date, paid_amount FROM loan_repayments ORDER BY loan_id, due_date

question: What are the top 5 loan products by total disbursed amount, with their respective total disbursed amounts and average interest rates?
sql: WITH ranked_products AS (SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed, AVG(lp.interest_rate_pct) AS avg_interest_rate FROM loan_products lp JOIN loan_applications la ON lp.product_id = la.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name ORDER BY total_disbursed DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT product_id, name, total_disbursed, avg_interest_rate FROM ranked_products

question: Find the loan applications that have been approved but not yet disbursed, along with the borrower's credit score and the loan product's interest rate
sql: WITH approved_applications AS (SELECT la.application_id, la.borrower_id, la.product_id FROM loan_applications la WHERE la.status = 'approved' AND la.application_id NOT IN (SELECT application_id FROM loans)) SELECT aa.application_id, b.credit_score, lp.interest_rate_pct FROM approved_applications aa JOIN borrowers b ON aa.borrower_id = b.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON aa.product_id = lp.product_id

question: Show me the running total of disbursed amounts by month, along with the month-over-month delta
sql: WITH monthly_disbursed AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', l.disbursed_at) AS month, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l GROUP BY month) SELECT month, total_disbursed, total_disbursed - LAG(total_disbursed) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS mom_delta FROM monthly_disbursed

question: Find the average credit score of borrowers who have been approved for a loan, by loan product
sql: WITH approved_borrowers AS (SELECT la.borrower_id, la.product_id FROM loan_applications la WHERE la.status = 'approved') SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, AVG(b.credit_score) AS avg_credit_score FROM approved_borrowers ab JOIN borrowers b ON ab.borrower_id = b.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON ab.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name

question: What are the top 3 loan products by average disbursed amount, with their respective average interest rates?
sql: WITH ranked_products AS (SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, AVG(l.disbursed_amount) AS avg_disbursed, AVG(lp.interest_rate_pct) AS avg_interest_rate FROM loan_products lp JOIN loan_applications la ON lp.product_id = la.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name ORDER BY avg_disbursed DESC LIMIT 3) SELECT product_id, name, avg_disbursed, avg_interest_rate FROM ranked_products

question: Show me the month-over-month change in the number of loan applications, by loan product
sql: WITH monthly_applications AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', la.applied_at) AS month, lp.product_id, COUNT(la.application_id) AS num_applications FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY month, lp.product_id) SELECT month, product_id, num_applications, num_applications - LAG(num_applications) OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY month) AS mom_delta FROM monthly_applications

question: Find the borrowers who have been rejected for a loan more than once, along with the reasons for rejection
sql: WITH rejected_borrowers AS (SELECT la.borrower_id, la.rejection_reason FROM loan_applications la WHERE la.status = 'rejected' GROUP BY la.borrower_id, la.rejection_reason HAVING COUNT(la.application_id) > 1) SELECT rb.borrower_id, b.full_name, rb.rejection_reason FROM rejected_borrowers rb JOIN borrowers b ON rb.borrower_id = b.borrower_id

question: What are the loan products with the highest average outstanding amount, along with their respective average interest rates?
sql: WITH ranked_products AS (SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, AVG(l.outstanding) AS avg_outstanding, AVG(lp.interest_rate_pct) AS avg_interest_rate FROM loan_products lp JOIN loan_applications la ON lp.product_id = la.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name ORDER BY avg_outstanding DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT product_id, name, avg_outstanding, avg_interest_rate FROM ranked_products

question: Show me the running total of repayments made by month, along with the month-over-month delta
sql: WITH monthly_repayments AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', r.paid_date) AS month, SUM(r.paid_amount) AS total_repaid FROM repayments r GROUP BY month) SELECT month, total_repaid, total_repaid - LAG(total_repaid) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS mom_delta FROM monthly_repayments

question: Find the loan applications that have been approved but not yet disbursed, along with the borrower's employment type and the loan product's max tenure
sql: WITH approved_applications AS (SELECT la.application_id, la.borrower_id, la.product_id FROM loan_applications la WHERE la.status = 'approved' AND la.application_id NOT IN (SELECT application_id FROM loans)) SELECT aa.application_id, b.employment_type, lp.max_tenure_months FROM approved_applications aa JOIN borrowers b ON aa.borrower_id = b.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON aa.product_id = lp.product_id

question: Which loan products have the highest average credit score of approved borrowers?
sql: WITH approved_borrowers AS (SELECT la.product_id, b.credit_score FROM loan_applications la JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id WHERE la.status = 'approved') SELECT ab.product_id, lp.name, AVG(ab.credit_score) AS avg_credit_score FROM approved_borrowers ab JOIN loan_products lp ON ab.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY ab.product_id, lp.name ORDER BY avg_credit_score DESC LIMIT 5

question: Show me the month-over-month change in the number of loans disbursed, by loan product
sql: WITH monthly_disbursed AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', l.disbursed_at) AS month, lp.product_id, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS num_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY month, lp.product_id) SELECT month, product_id, num_disbursed, num_disbursed - LAG(num_disbursed) OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY month) AS mom_delta FROM monthly_disbursed

question: What are the loan products with the lowest average disbursed amount, along with their respective average interest rates?
sql: WITH ranked_products AS (SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, AVG(l.disbursed_amount) AS avg_disbursed, AVG(lp.interest_rate_pct) AS avg_interest_rate FROM loan_products lp JOIN loan_applications la ON lp.product_id = la.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name ORDER BY avg_disbursed ASC LIMIT 5) SELECT product_id, name, avg_disbursed, avg_interest_rate FROM ranked_products

question: Show me the running total of loan applications by month, along with the month-over-month delta
sql: WITH monthly_applications AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', la.applied_at) AS month, COUNT(la.application_id) AS num_applications FROM loan_applications la GROUP BY month) SELECT month, num_applications, num_applications - LAG(num_applications) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS mom_delta FROM monthly_applications

question: Find the borrowers who have been rejected for a loan with a rejection reason of 'credit score', along with the loan product's min amount and max amount
sql: WITH rejected_borrowers AS (SELECT la.borrower_id, la.product_id FROM loan_applications la WHERE la.rejection_reason = 'credit score') SELECT rb.borrower_id, b.full_name, lp.min_amount, lp.max_amount FROM rejected_borrowers rb JOIN borrowers b ON rb.borrower_id = b.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON rb.product_id = lp.product_id

question: What are the loan products with the highest average outstanding amount, along with their respective average interest rates and product type?
sql: WITH ranked_products AS (SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, AVG(l.outstanding) AS avg_outstanding, AVG(lp.interest_rate_pct) AS avg_interest_rate, lp.product_type FROM loan_products lp JOIN loan_applications la ON lp.product_id = la.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name, lp.product_type ORDER BY avg_outstanding DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT product_id, name, avg_outstanding, avg_interest_rate, product_type FROM ranked_products

question: Show me the month-over-month change in the number of loan repayments made, by loan product
sql: WITH monthly_repayments AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', r.paid_date) AS month, lp.product_id, COUNT(r.repayment_id) AS num_repaid FROM repayments r JOIN loans l ON r.loan_id = l.loan_id JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY month, lp.product_id) SELECT month, product_id, num_repaid, num_repaid - LAG(num_repaid) OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY month) AS mom_delta FROM monthly_repayments

question: Find the loan applications that have been approved but not yet disbursed, along with the borrower's annual income and the loan product's interest rate
sql: WITH approved_applications AS (SELECT la.application_id, la.borrower_id, la.product_id FROM loan_applications la WHERE la.status = 'approved' AND la.application_id NOT IN (SELECT application_id FROM loans)) SELECT aa.application_id, b.annual_income, lp.interest_rate_pct FROM approved_applications aa JOIN borrowers b ON aa.borrower_id = b.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON aa.product_id = lp.product_id

question: Find the top 3 loan products with the highest average disbursed amount per borrower, considering only loans with a disbursed amount greater than 10000
sql: WITH ranked_products AS (SELECT lp.product_id, AVG(l.disbursed_amount) AS avg_disbursed_amount FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id WHERE l.disbursed_amount > 10000 GROUP BY lp.product_id) SELECT product_id, avg_disbursed_amount FROM ranked_products ORDER BY avg_disbursed_amount DESC LIMIT 3

question: List all borrowers who have at least two loan applications with different loan products, along with the product names
sql: WITH borrower_applications AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, lp.name AS product_name FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id) SELECT borrower_id, product_name FROM borrower_applications WHERE borrower_id IN (SELECT borrower_id FROM borrower_applications GROUP BY borrower_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT product_name) > 1) ORDER BY borrower_id

question: Find the borrowers with the highest credit score who have not applied for a loan in the last 3 months
sql: WITH recent_applicants AS (SELECT borrower_id FROM loan_applications WHERE applied_at > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '3 month') SELECT b.borrower_id, b.credit_score FROM borrowers b WHERE b.borrower_id NOT IN (SELECT borrower_id FROM recent_applicants) ORDER BY b.credit_score DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the loan products with the highest average interest rate, considering only loan applications with a requested amount greater than 50000
sql: WITH ranked_products AS (SELECT lp.product_id, AVG(lp.interest_rate_pct) AS avg_interest_rate FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE la.requested_amount > 50000 GROUP BY lp.product_id) SELECT product_id, avg_interest_rate FROM ranked_products ORDER BY avg_interest_rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the month-over-month delta in disbursed amounts for each loan product, considering only loans disbursed in the last year
sql: WITH monthly_disbursed AS (SELECT lp.product_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM l.disbursed_at) AS month, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE l.disbursed_at > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year' GROUP BY lp.product_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM l.disbursed_at)) SELECT product_id, month, total_disbursed, LAG(total_disbursed) OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_disbursed, total_disbursed - LAG(total_disbursed) OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY month) AS delta FROM monthly_disbursed ORDER BY product_id, month

question: Find the top 5 borrowers with the highest total disbursed amount, considering only loans with a disbursed amount greater than 20000
sql: WITH ranked_borrowers AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id WHERE l.disbursed_amount > 20000 GROUP BY b.borrower_id) SELECT borrower_id, total_disbursed FROM ranked_borrowers ORDER BY total_disbursed DESC LIMIT 5

question: List all loan applications with a requested tenure greater than the maximum allowed tenure for the corresponding loan product
sql: SELECT la.application_id, la.requested_tenure, lp.max_tenure_months FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE la.requested_tenure > lp.max_tenure_months

question: Show the cumulative sum of paid amounts for each loan, considering only repayments made in the last 6 months
sql: WITH recent_repayments AS (SELECT l.loan_id, r.paid_amount, r.paid_date FROM repayments r JOIN loans l ON r.loan_id = l.loan_id WHERE r.paid_date > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 month') SELECT loan_id, paid_amount, paid_date, SUM(paid_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY loan_id ORDER BY paid_date) AS cumulative_sum FROM recent_repayments ORDER BY loan_id, paid_date

question: Find the borrowers with the lowest credit score who have at least two loan applications with different loan products
sql: WITH borrower_applications AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, b.credit_score, lp.name AS product_name FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id) SELECT borrower_id, credit_score FROM borrower_applications WHERE borrower_id IN (SELECT borrower_id FROM borrower_applications GROUP BY borrower_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT product_name) > 1) ORDER BY credit_score ASC LIMIT 1

question: List the loan products with the highest average requested amount, considering only loan applications with a requested tenure greater than 12 months
sql: WITH ranked_products AS (SELECT lp.product_id, AVG(la.requested_amount) AS avg_requested_amount FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE la.requested_tenure > 12 GROUP BY lp.product_id) SELECT product_id, avg_requested_amount FROM ranked_products ORDER BY avg_requested_amount DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the ranking of loan products by their average interest rate, considering only loan applications with a requested amount greater than 100000
sql: WITH ranked_products AS (SELECT lp.product_id, AVG(lp.interest_rate_pct) AS avg_interest_rate FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE la.requested_amount > 100000 GROUP BY lp.product_id) SELECT product_id, avg_interest_rate, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY avg_interest_rate DESC) AS rank FROM ranked_products ORDER BY rank

question: Find the top 3 borrowers with the highest total outstanding amount, considering only loans with an outstanding amount greater than 50000
sql: WITH ranked_borrowers AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, SUM(l.outstanding) AS total_outstanding FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id WHERE l.outstanding > 50000 GROUP BY b.borrower_id) SELECT borrower_id, total_outstanding FROM ranked_borrowers ORDER BY total_outstanding DESC LIMIT 3

question: List all loan applications with a requested amount greater than the maximum allowed amount for the corresponding loan product
sql: SELECT la.application_id, la.requested_amount, lp.max_amount FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE la.requested_amount > lp.max_amount

question: Show the cumulative sum of disbursed amounts for each loan product, considering only loans disbursed in the last year
sql: WITH monthly_disbursed AS (SELECT lp.product_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM l.disbursed_at) AS month, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE l.disbursed_at > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year' GROUP BY lp.product_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM l.disbursed_at)) SELECT product_id, month, total_disbursed, SUM(total_disbursed) OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY month) AS cumulative_sum FROM monthly_disbursed ORDER BY product_id, month

question: Find the borrowers with the highest annual income who have at least two loan applications with different loan products
sql: WITH borrower_applications AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, b.annual_income, lp.name AS product_name FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id) SELECT borrower_id, annual_income FROM borrower_applications WHERE borrower_id IN (SELECT borrower_id FROM borrower_applications GROUP BY borrower_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT product_name) > 1) ORDER BY annual_income DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the loan products with the lowest average requested tenure, considering only loan applications with a requested amount greater than 20000
sql: WITH ranked_products AS (SELECT lp.product_id, AVG(la.requested_tenure) AS avg_requested_tenure FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE la.requested_amount > 20000 GROUP BY lp.product_id) SELECT product_id, avg_requested_tenure FROM ranked_products ORDER BY avg_requested_tenure ASC LIMIT 1

question: Show the ranking of borrowers by their total disbursed amount, considering only loans with a disbursed amount greater than 10000
sql: WITH ranked_borrowers AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id WHERE l.disbursed_amount > 10000 GROUP BY b.borrower_id) SELECT borrower_id, total_disbursed, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_disbursed DESC) AS rank FROM ranked_borrowers ORDER BY rank

question: Find the top 5 loan products with the highest average outstanding amount, considering only loans with an outstanding amount greater than 10000
sql: WITH ranked_products AS (SELECT lp.product_id, AVG(l.outstanding) AS avg_outstanding FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE l.outstanding > 10000 GROUP BY lp.product_id) SELECT product_id, avg_outstanding FROM ranked_products ORDER BY avg_outstanding DESC LIMIT 5

question: List all loan applications with a requested amount greater than the maximum allowed amount for the corresponding loan product and a requested tenure greater than the maximum allowed tenure
sql: SELECT la.application_id, la.requested_amount, la.requested_tenure, lp.max_amount, lp.max_tenure_months FROM loan_applications la JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id WHERE la.requested_amount > lp.max_amount AND la.requested_tenure > lp.max_tenure_months

question: Find the top 5 loan products with the highest average disbursed amount per borrower, along with the product name and average disbursed amount, ordered by average disbursed amount in descending order
sql: WITH ranked_products AS (SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, AVG(l.disbursed_amount) AS avg_disbursed_amount FROM loan_products lp JOIN loan_applications la ON lp.product_id = la.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY lp.product_id, lp.name ORDER BY avg_disbursed_amount DESC) SELECT product_id, name, avg_disbursed_amount FROM ranked_products LIMIT 5

question: Show me the loan applications where the requested amount is greater than the average requested amount for the same product type, along with the borrower's full name and the product name
sql: WITH avg_requested_amounts AS (SELECT la.product_id, AVG(la.requested_amount) AS avg_requested_amount FROM loan_applications la GROUP BY la.product_id) SELECT b.full_name, lp.name, la.requested_amount FROM loan_applications la JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id JOIN avg_requested_amounts ara ON la.product_id = ara.product_id WHERE la.requested_amount > ara.avg_requested_amount

question: List all loans with a running total of outstanding amounts, ordered by loan id
sql: SELECT loan_id, outstanding, SUM(outstanding) OVER (ORDER BY loan_id) AS running_total FROM loans

question: Find the borrowers who have taken loans from more than one loan product, along with the number of loan products they have taken loans from
sql: WITH borrower_products AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, COUNT(DISTINCT lp.product_id) AS num_products FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id GROUP BY b.borrower_id) SELECT bp.borrower_id, b.full_name, bp.num_products FROM borrower_products bp JOIN borrowers b ON bp.borrower_id = b.borrower_id WHERE bp.num_products > 1

question: Show me the month-over-month delta in the number of loan applications, along with the month and year
sql: WITH monthly_applications AS (SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM la.applied_at) AS month, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM la.applied_at) AS year, COUNT(*) AS num_applications FROM loan_applications la GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM la.applied_at), EXTRACT(YEAR FROM la.applied_at)) SELECT ma1.month, ma1.year, ma1.num_applications - LAG(ma1.num_applications) OVER (ORDER BY ma1.year, ma1.month) AS delta FROM monthly_applications ma1

question: Find the top 10 borrowers with the highest total disbursed amount, along with their full name and total disbursed amount, ordered by total disbursed amount in descending order
sql: WITH ranked_borrowers AS (SELECT b.borrower_id, b.full_name, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) AS total_disbursed_amount FROM borrowers b JOIN loan_applications la ON b.borrower_id = la.borrower_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id GROUP BY b.borrower_id, b.full_name ORDER BY total_disbursed_amount DESC) SELECT borrower_id, full_name, total_disbursed_amount FROM ranked_borrowers LIMIT 10

question: List all loan products with their corresponding rank based on the average interest rate, along with the product name and average interest rate
sql: SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, lp.interest_rate_pct, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY lp.interest_rate_pct) AS rank FROM loan_products lp

question: Find the borrowers who have taken loans with an outstanding amount greater than the average outstanding amount for the same loan product, along with the borrower's full name and the product name
sql: WITH avg_outstanding_amounts AS (SELECT l.application_id, AVG(l.outstanding) AS avg_outstanding_amount FROM loans l GROUP BY l.application_id) SELECT b.full_name, lp.name, l.outstanding FROM loans l JOIN loan_applications la ON l.application_id = la.application_id JOIN borrowers b ON la.borrower_id = b.borrower_id JOIN loan_products lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id JOIN avg_outstanding_amounts aoa ON l.application_id = aoa.application_id WHERE l.outstanding > aoa.avg_outstanding_amount

question: Show me the running total of disbursed amounts for each loan product, ordered by product id
sql: SELECT lp.product_id, lp.name, SUM(l.disbursed_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY lp.product_id ORDER BY lp.product_id) AS running_total FROM loan_products lp JOIN loan_applications la ON lp.product_id = la.product_id JOIN loans l ON la.application_id = l.application_id

question: What is the total capacity of all warehouses?
sql: SELECT SUM(capacity) FROM warehouses

question: List all active delivery agents
sql: SELECT * FROM delivery_agents WHERE active = TRUE

question: How many parcels are currently in the system?
sql: SELECT COUNT(parcel_id) FROM parcels

question: What is the average weight of all parcels?
sql: SELECT AVG(weight_kg) FROM parcels

question: Find the warehouse with the highest current load
sql: SELECT * FROM warehouses ORDER BY current_load DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all unique vehicle types used by delivery agents
sql: SELECT DISTINCT vehicle_type FROM delivery_agents

question: What is the total declared value of all parcels?
sql: SELECT SUM(declared_value) FROM parcels

question: How many delivery agents are assigned to each warehouse?
sql: SELECT warehouse_id, COUNT(agent_id) FROM delivery_agents GROUP BY warehouse_id

question: List all parcels that are still pending delivery
sql: SELECT * FROM parcels WHERE status = 'pending'

question: What is the average rating of all delivery agents?
sql: SELECT AVG(rating) FROM delivery_agents

question: Find the parcel with the highest declared value
sql: SELECT * FROM parcels ORDER BY declared_value DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all warehouses in the 'North' region
sql: SELECT * FROM warehouses WHERE region = 'North'

question: How many delivery attempts have been made?
sql: SELECT COUNT(attempt_id) FROM delivery_attempts

question: What is the total distance traveled by all routes?
sql: SELECT SUM(distance_km) FROM routes

question: List all parcels that weigh more than 10kg
sql: SELECT * FROM parcels WHERE weight_kg > 10

question: Find the delivery agent with the highest rating
sql: SELECT * FROM delivery_agents ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average weight of parcels delivered by each agent in the last month?
sql: SELECT da.agent_id, AVG(p.weight_kg) AS avg_weight FROM parcels p JOIN delivery_attempts da ON p.parcel_id = da.parcel_id WHERE da.attempt_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month' GROUP BY da.agent_id

question: Show me the top 5 warehouses with the highest number of parcels sent from them
sql: SELECT w.warehouse_id, w.city, COUNT(p.parcel_id) AS parcel_count FROM parcels p JOIN delivery_agents da ON p.sender_id = da.agent_id JOIN warehouses w ON da.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id, w.city ORDER BY parcel_count DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the average rating of agents in each region?
sql: SELECT w.region, AVG(da.rating) AS avg_rating FROM delivery_agents da JOIN warehouses w ON da.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id GROUP BY w.region

question: Find the total distance traveled by each agent in the last week
sql: SELECT da.agent_id, da.name, SUM(r.distance_km) AS total_distance FROM routes r JOIN delivery_agents da ON r.agent_id = da.agent_id WHERE r.date > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 week' GROUP BY da.agent_id, da.name

question: List all parcels with their corresponding delivery attempts and outcomes
sql: SELECT p.parcel_id, p.status, da.outcome, da.failure_reason FROM parcels p JOIN delivery_attempts da ON p.parcel_id = da.parcel_id

question: What is the total value of parcels delivered by each agent?
sql: SELECT da.agent_id, SUM(p.declared_value) AS total_value FROM parcels p JOIN delivery_attempts da ON p.parcel_id = da.parcel_id GROUP BY da.agent_id

question: Show me the number of parcels delivered to each city
sql: SELECT p.receiver_city, COUNT(p.parcel_id) AS parcel_count FROM parcels p GROUP BY p.receiver_city

question: Find the average capacity utilization of warehouses in each region
sql: SELECT w.region, AVG(w.current_load / w.capacity) AS avg_utilization FROM warehouses w GROUP BY w.region

question: List all warehouses with their current load and capacity
sql: SELECT w.warehouse_id, w.city, w.current_load, w.capacity FROM warehouses w

question: What is the average weight of parcels delivered to each city?
sql: SELECT p.receiver_city, AVG(p.weight_kg) AS avg_weight FROM parcels p GROUP BY p.receiver_city

question: Find the total number of parcels sent from each warehouse
sql: SELECT w.warehouse_id, w.city, COUNT(p.parcel_id) AS parcel_count FROM parcels p JOIN delivery_agents da ON p.sender_id = da.agent_id JOIN warehouses w ON da.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id, w.city

question: List all agents with their vehicle type and rating
sql: SELECT da.agent_id, da.name, da.vehicle_type, da.rating FROM delivery_agents da

question: Show me the number of delivery attempts made to each city
sql: SELECT p.receiver_city, COUNT(da.attempt_id) AS attempt_count FROM parcels p JOIN delivery_attempts da ON p.parcel_id = da.parcel_id GROUP BY p.receiver_city

question: What is the average declared value of parcels delivered by each agent?
sql: SELECT da.agent_id, AVG(p.declared_value) AS avg_value FROM parcels p JOIN delivery_attempts da ON p.parcel_id = da.parcel_id GROUP BY da.agent_id

question: Find the total distance traveled by all agents in the last month
sql: SELECT SUM(r.distance_km) AS total_distance FROM routes r WHERE r.date > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month'

question: List all parcels with their status and corresponding delivery attempts
sql: SELECT p.parcel_id, p.status, da.attempt_time, da.outcome FROM parcels p JOIN delivery_attempts da ON p.parcel_id = da.parcel_id

question: What is the total number of active agents in each region?
sql: SELECT w.region, COUNT(da.agent_id) AS active_agents FROM delivery_agents da JOIN warehouses w ON da.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id WHERE da.active = TRUE GROUP BY w.region

question: What is the average weight of parcels delivered by each agent in the last month?
sql: SELECT da.agent_id, AVG(p.weight_kg) AS avg_weight FROM parcels p JOIN delivery_attempts da ON p.parcel_id = da.parcel_id WHERE da.attempt_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month' GROUP BY da.agent_id

question: List all active agents with their corresponding warehouse city and average rating
sql: SELECT da.name, w.city, AVG(da.rating) AS avg_rating FROM delivery_agents da JOIN warehouses w ON da.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id WHERE da.active = TRUE GROUP BY da.name, w.city

question: Show me the number of parcels delivered by each warehouse in the last quarter
sql: SELECT w.warehouse_id, COUNT(p.parcel_id) AS num_parcels FROM parcels p JOIN delivery_attempts da ON p.parcel_id = da.parcel_id JOIN delivery_agents d ON da.agent_id = d.agent_id JOIN warehouses w ON d.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id WHERE da.attempt_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 month' GROUP BY w.warehouse_id

question: Find the total distance traveled by each agent in the last week
sql: SELECT da.agent_id, SUM(r.distance_km) AS total_distance FROM routes r JOIN delivery_agents da ON r.agent_id = da.agent_id WHERE r.date > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 week' GROUP BY da.agent_id

question: What is the average declared value of parcels sent to each city?
sql: SELECT p.receiver_city, AVG(p.declared_value) AS avg_declared_value FROM parcels p GROUP BY p.receiver_city

question: List all warehouses with their current load and average capacity utilization
sql: SELECT w.warehouse_id, w.current_load, AVG(w.current_load / w.capacity) AS avg_utilization FROM warehouses w GROUP BY w.warehouse_id, w.current_load

question: Show me the number of delivery attempts made by each agent in the last month
sql: SELECT da.agent_id, COUNT(da.attempt_id) AS num_attempts FROM delivery_attempts da WHERE da.attempt_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month' GROUP BY da.agent_id

question: Find the total number of parcels delivered to each region
sql: SELECT w.region, COUNT(p.parcel_id) AS num_parcels FROM parcels p JOIN delivery_attempts da ON p.parcel_id = da.parcel_id JOIN delivery_agents d ON da.agent_id = d.agent_id JOIN warehouses w ON d.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id GROUP BY w.region

question: What is the average rating of agents in each warehouse?
sql: SELECT w.warehouse_id, AVG(da.rating) AS avg_rating FROM delivery_agents da JOIN warehouses w ON da.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id

question: List all parcels with their status and the number of delivery attempts made
sql: SELECT p.parcel_id, p.status, COUNT(da.attempt_id) AS num_attempts FROM parcels p JOIN delivery_attempts da ON p.parcel_id = da.parcel_id GROUP BY p.parcel_id, p.status

question: Show me the number of active agents in each warehouse
sql: SELECT w.warehouse_id, COUNT(da.agent_id) AS num_active_agents FROM delivery_agents da JOIN warehouses w ON da.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id WHERE da.active = TRUE GROUP BY w.warehouse_id

question: Find the total weight of parcels delivered to each city
sql: SELECT p.receiver_city, SUM(p.weight_kg) AS total_weight FROM parcels p GROUP BY p.receiver_city

question: What is the average distance traveled by agents in each warehouse?
sql: SELECT w.warehouse_id, AVG(r.distance_km) AS avg_distance FROM routes r JOIN delivery_agents da ON r.agent_id = da.agent_id JOIN warehouses w ON da.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id

question: Show me the number of parcels with a declared value above 1000
sql: SELECT COUNT(p.parcel_id) AS num_parcels FROM parcels p WHERE p.declared_value > 1000

question: Find the total number of delivery attempts with a failure reason
sql: SELECT COUNT(da.attempt_id) AS num_attempts FROM delivery_attempts da WHERE da.failure_reason IS NOT NULL

question: Find the running total of parcels delivered by each agent over time
sql: WITH parcels_delivered AS (SELECT agent_id, created_at, SUM(CASE WHEN outcome = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS parcels_delivered FROM delivery_attempts JOIN parcels ON delivery_attempts.parcel_id = parcels.parcel_id GROUP BY agent_id, created_at) SELECT agent_id, created_at, SUM(parcels_delivered) OVER (PARTITION BY agent_id ORDER BY created_at) AS running_total FROM parcels_delivered

question: Which agents have a higher rating than the average rating of all agents in their warehouse?
sql: WITH avg_warehouse_rating AS (SELECT warehouse_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM delivery_agents GROUP BY warehouse_id) SELECT da.name, da.rating FROM delivery_agents da JOIN avg_warehouse_rating awr ON da.warehouse_id = awr.warehouse_id WHERE da.rating > awr.avg_rating

question: Show me the month-over-month delta in parcel delivery attempts for each agent
sql: WITH monthly_attempts AS (SELECT agent_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM attempt_time) AS month, COUNT(*) AS attempts FROM delivery_attempts GROUP BY agent_id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM attempt_time)) SELECT agent_id, month, attempts, LAG(attempts) OVER (PARTITION BY agent_id ORDER BY month) AS prev_attempts, attempts - LAG(attempts) OVER (PARTITION BY agent_id ORDER BY month) AS delta FROM monthly_attempts

question: Find the top 5 routes with the highest total distance traveled by each agent
sql: WITH ranked_routes AS (SELECT agent_id, route_id, SUM(distance_km) AS total_distance, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY agent_id ORDER BY SUM(distance_km) DESC) AS rank FROM routes GROUP BY agent_id, route_id) SELECT agent_id, route_id, total_distance FROM ranked_routes WHERE rank <= 5

question: Show me the cumulative sum of parcels delivered by each agent over time
sql: WITH parcels_delivered AS (SELECT da.agent_id, da.attempt_time, SUM(CASE WHEN da.outcome = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS parcels_delivered FROM delivery_attempts da JOIN parcels p ON da.parcel_id = p.parcel_id GROUP BY da.agent_id, da.attempt_time) SELECT agent_id, attempt_time, SUM(parcels_delivered) OVER (PARTITION BY agent_id ORDER BY attempt_time) AS cumulative_sum FROM parcels_delivered

question: What is the average rating of agents in each warehouse?
sql: WITH avg_warehouse_rating AS (SELECT warehouse_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM delivery_agents GROUP BY warehouse_id) SELECT warehouse_id, avg_rating FROM avg_warehouse_rating

question: Find the top 5 routes with the highest total distance traveled by each warehouse
sql: WITH ranked_routes AS (SELECT w.warehouse_id, r.route_id, SUM(r.distance_km) AS total_distance, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY w.warehouse_id ORDER BY SUM(r.distance_km) DESC) AS rank FROM routes r JOIN warehouses w ON r.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id, r.route_id) SELECT warehouse_id, route_id, total_distance FROM ranked_routes WHERE rank <= 5

question: What is the average rating of warehouses in each region?
sql: WITH avg_region_rating AS (SELECT w.region, AVG(da.rating) AS avg_rating FROM delivery_agents da JOIN warehouses w ON da.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id GROUP BY w.region) SELECT region, avg_rating FROM avg_region_rating

question: What are the top 5 cities with the highest average weight of parcels, and what is the average weight of parcels in each of these cities?
sql: WITH avg_weight AS (SELECT receiver_city, AVG(weight_kg) AS avg_weight FROM parcels GROUP BY receiver_city) SELECT receiver_city, avg_weight FROM avg_weight ORDER BY avg_weight DESC LIMIT 5

question: List all delivery agents who have made at least 2 delivery attempts, along with the number of attempts they have made and their average rating.
sql: WITH attempts AS (SELECT agent_id, COUNT(attempt_id) AS num_attempts FROM delivery_attempts GROUP BY agent_id HAVING COUNT(attempt_id) >= 2) SELECT da.agent_id, da.name, a.num_attempts, da.rating FROM delivery_agents da JOIN attempts a ON da.agent_id = a.agent_id

question: Find the warehouse with the highest capacity and the number of parcels that have been sent from it.
sql: WITH warehouse_parcels AS (SELECT w.warehouse_id, COUNT(p.parcel_id) AS num_parcels FROM warehouses w JOIN delivery_agents da ON w.warehouse_id = da.warehouse_id JOIN parcels p ON da.agent_id = p.sender_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id) SELECT w.warehouse_id, w.capacity, wp.num_parcels FROM warehouses w JOIN warehouse_parcels wp ON w.warehouse_id = wp.warehouse_id ORDER BY w.capacity DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average distance traveled by delivery agents per day, and how does it compare to the overall average distance traveled?
sql: WITH daily_distance AS (SELECT agent_id, date, SUM(distance_km) AS daily_distance FROM routes GROUP BY agent_id, date) SELECT AVG(daily_distance) AS avg_daily_distance, (SELECT AVG(distance_km) FROM routes) AS overall_avg_distance FROM daily_distance

question: List all parcels that have been attempted to be delivered at least twice, along with the number of attempts and the outcome of the last attempt.
sql: WITH attempts AS (SELECT parcel_id, COUNT(attempt_id) AS num_attempts, MAX(attempt_time) AS last_attempt_time FROM delivery_attempts GROUP BY parcel_id HAVING COUNT(attempt_id) >= 2) SELECT p.parcel_id, a.num_attempts, da.outcome FROM parcels p JOIN attempts a ON p.parcel_id = a.parcel_id JOIN delivery_attempts da ON p.parcel_id = da.parcel_id AND a.last_attempt_time = da.attempt_time

question: Find the top 3 delivery agents with the highest average rating, and the number of parcels they have delivered.
sql: WITH agent_ratings AS (SELECT agent_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM delivery_agents GROUP BY agent_id) SELECT da.agent_id, da.name, ar.avg_rating, (SELECT COUNT(parcel_id) FROM delivery_attempts WHERE agent_id = da.agent_id) AS num_parcels FROM delivery_agents da JOIN agent_ratings ar ON da.agent_id = ar.agent_id ORDER BY ar.avg_rating DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the total weight of parcels that have been sent from each warehouse, and how does it compare to the capacity of each warehouse?
sql: WITH warehouse_parcels AS (SELECT w.warehouse_id, SUM(p.weight_kg) AS total_weight FROM warehouses w JOIN delivery_agents da ON w.warehouse_id = da.warehouse_id JOIN parcels p ON da.agent_id = p.sender_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id) SELECT w.warehouse_id, w.capacity, wp.total_weight FROM warehouses w JOIN warehouse_parcels wp ON w.warehouse_id = wp.warehouse_id

question: List all parcels that have been delivered successfully, along with the delivery agent and the warehouse they were sent from.
sql: WITH successful_deliveries AS (SELECT parcel_id, agent_id, outcome FROM delivery_attempts WHERE outcome = 'success') SELECT p.parcel_id, da.name, w.city FROM parcels p JOIN successful_deliveries sd ON p.parcel_id = sd.parcel_id JOIN delivery_agents da ON sd.agent_id = da.agent_id JOIN warehouses w ON da.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id

question: Find the warehouse with the lowest current load and the number of parcels that have been sent from it.
sql: WITH warehouse_parcels AS (SELECT w.warehouse_id, COUNT(p.parcel_id) AS num_parcels FROM warehouses w JOIN delivery_agents da ON w.warehouse_id = da.warehouse_id JOIN parcels p ON da.agent_id = p.sender_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id) SELECT w.warehouse_id, w.current_load, wp.num_parcels FROM warehouses w JOIN warehouse_parcels wp ON w.warehouse_id = wp.warehouse_id ORDER BY w.current_load ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average rating of delivery agents per warehouse, and how does it compare to the overall average rating?
sql: WITH warehouse_ratings AS (SELECT w.warehouse_id, AVG(da.rating) AS avg_rating FROM warehouses w JOIN delivery_agents da ON w.warehouse_id = da.warehouse_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id) SELECT wr.warehouse_id, wr.avg_rating, (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM delivery_agents) AS overall_avg_rating FROM warehouse_ratings wr

question: List all parcels that have been attempted to be delivered at least once, along with the number of attempts and the outcome of the last attempt.
sql: WITH attempts AS (SELECT parcel_id, COUNT(attempt_id) AS num_attempts, MAX(attempt_time) AS last_attempt_time FROM delivery_attempts GROUP BY parcel_id) SELECT p.parcel_id, a.num_attempts, da.outcome FROM parcels p JOIN attempts a ON p.parcel_id = a.parcel_id JOIN delivery_attempts da ON p.parcel_id = da.parcel_id AND a.last_attempt_time = da.attempt_time

question: Find the top 5 delivery agents with the highest number of successful deliveries, and the number of parcels they have delivered.
sql: WITH successful_deliveries AS (SELECT agent_id, COUNT(parcel_id) AS num_successes FROM delivery_attempts WHERE outcome = 'success' GROUP BY agent_id) SELECT da.agent_id, da.name, sd.num_successes, (SELECT COUNT(parcel_id) FROM delivery_attempts WHERE agent_id = da.agent_id) AS num_parcels FROM delivery_agents da JOIN successful_deliveries sd ON da.agent_id = sd.agent_id ORDER BY sd.num_successes DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the total distance traveled by delivery agents per day, and how does it compare to the overall total distance traveled?
sql: WITH daily_distance AS (SELECT date, SUM(distance_km) AS daily_distance FROM routes GROUP BY date) SELECT dd.date, dd.daily_distance, (SELECT SUM(distance_km) FROM routes) AS overall_total_distance FROM daily_distance dd

question: List all warehouses that have a current load greater than their capacity, along with the number of parcels that have been sent from them.
sql: WITH warehouse_parcels AS (SELECT w.warehouse_id, COUNT(p.parcel_id) AS num_parcels FROM warehouses w JOIN delivery_agents da ON w.warehouse_id = da.warehouse_id JOIN parcels p ON da.agent_id = p.sender_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id) SELECT w.warehouse_id, w.current_load, w.capacity, wp.num_parcels FROM warehouses w JOIN warehouse_parcels wp ON w.warehouse_id = wp.warehouse_id WHERE w.current_load > w.capacity

question: Find the delivery agent with the highest average rating, and the number of parcels they have delivered.
sql: WITH agent_ratings AS (SELECT agent_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM delivery_agents GROUP BY agent_id) SELECT da.agent_id, da.name, ar.avg_rating, (SELECT COUNT(parcel_id) FROM delivery_attempts WHERE agent_id = da.agent_id) AS num_parcels FROM delivery_agents da JOIN agent_ratings ar ON da.agent_id = ar.agent_id ORDER BY ar.avg_rating DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average weight of parcels that have been sent from each warehouse, and how does it compare to the overall average weight?
sql: WITH warehouse_parcels AS (SELECT w.warehouse_id, AVG(p.weight_kg) AS avg_weight FROM warehouses w JOIN delivery_agents da ON w.warehouse_id = da.warehouse_id JOIN parcels p ON da.agent_id = p.sender_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id) SELECT w.warehouse_id, wp.avg_weight, (SELECT AVG(weight_kg) FROM parcels) AS overall_avg_weight FROM warehouses w JOIN warehouse_parcels wp ON w.warehouse_id = wp.warehouse_id

question: List all parcels that have been delivered successfully, along with the delivery agent and the warehouse they were sent from, and the number of attempts it took to deliver them.
sql: WITH successful_deliveries AS (SELECT parcel_id, agent_id, outcome, COUNT(attempt_id) AS num_attempts FROM delivery_attempts WHERE outcome = 'success' GROUP BY parcel_id, agent_id, outcome) SELECT p.parcel_id, da.name, w.city, sd.num_attempts FROM parcels p JOIN successful_deliveries sd ON p.parcel_id = sd.parcel_id JOIN delivery_agents da ON sd.agent_id = da.agent_id JOIN warehouses w ON da.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id

question: Find the warehouse with the highest number of parcels that have been sent from it, and the total weight of these parcels.
sql: WITH warehouse_parcels AS (SELECT w.warehouse_id, COUNT(p.parcel_id) AS num_parcels, SUM(p.weight_kg) AS total_weight FROM warehouses w JOIN delivery_agents da ON w.warehouse_id = da.warehouse_id JOIN parcels p ON da.agent_id = p.sender_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id) SELECT w.warehouse_id, w.city, wp.num_parcels, wp.total_weight FROM warehouses w JOIN warehouse_parcels wp ON w.warehouse_id = wp.warehouse_id ORDER BY wp.num_parcels DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average number of stops per route, and how does it compare to the overall average number of stops?
sql: WITH route_stops AS (SELECT route_id, AVG(total_stops) AS avg_stops FROM routes GROUP BY route_id) SELECT rs.avg_stops, (SELECT AVG(total_stops) FROM routes) AS overall_avg_stops FROM route_stops rs

question: List all delivery agents who have made at least 5 delivery attempts, along with the number of attempts they have made and their average rating.
sql: WITH attempts AS (SELECT agent_id, COUNT(attempt_id) AS num_attempts FROM delivery_attempts GROUP BY agent_id HAVING COUNT(attempt_id) >= 5) SELECT da.agent_id, da.name, a.num_attempts, da.rating FROM delivery_agents da JOIN attempts a ON da.agent_id = a.agent_id

question: What is the rank of each warehouse by its current capacity within its region, and what is the total capacity of each region?
sql: WITH ranked_warehouses AS (SELECT region, warehouse_id, capacity, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY region ORDER BY capacity DESC) AS rank FROM warehouses) SELECT region, rank, capacity, SUM(capacity) OVER (PARTITION BY region) AS total_region_capacity FROM ranked_warehouses ORDER BY region, rank

question: Show me the top 3 delivery agents with the highest average rating for each warehouse, along with their average rating and the warehouse they belong to
sql: WITH ranked_agents AS (SELECT warehouse_id, agent_id, name, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY AVG(rating) DESC) AS rank FROM delivery_agents GROUP BY warehouse_id, agent_id, name) SELECT warehouse_id, agent_id, name, avg_rating FROM ranked_agents WHERE rank <= 3 ORDER BY warehouse_id, avg_rating DESC

question: Find the total weight of parcels that were successfully delivered by each agent, and the running total of parcel weights delivered by each agent over time
sql: WITH successful_deliveries AS (SELECT da.agent_id, p.parcel_id, p.weight_kg, da.attempt_time FROM delivery_attempts da JOIN parcels p ON da.parcel_id = p.parcel_id WHERE da.outcome = 'success') SELECT agent_id, SUM(weight_kg) AS total_weight, SUM(SUM(weight_kg)) OVER (ORDER BY attempt_time) AS running_total FROM successful_deliveries GROUP BY agent_id, attempt_time ORDER BY agent_id, attempt_time

question: List all parcels that have been attempted to be delivered more than once, along with the number of attempts and the most recent attempt time
sql: WITH parcel_attempts AS (SELECT p.parcel_id, COUNT(da.attempt_id) AS num_attempts, MAX(da.attempt_time) AS most_recent_attempt FROM parcels p JOIN delivery_attempts da ON p.parcel_id = da.parcel_id GROUP BY p.parcel_id HAVING COUNT(da.attempt_id) > 1) SELECT pa.parcel_id, pa.num_attempts, pa.most_recent_attempt FROM parcel_attempts pa

question: How many active users are there in the marketplace?
sql: SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM users WHERE is_active = TRUE

question: What is the average rating of all sellers?
sql: SELECT AVG(rating) FROM sellers

question: List all categories with their parent category IDs
sql: SELECT name, parent_id FROM categories

question: How many products are currently listed?
sql: SELECT COUNT(product_id) FROM products WHERE is_listed = TRUE

question: What is the total amount spent by all users?
sql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM orders

question: Find the number of reviews with a rating of 5
sql: SELECT COUNT(review_id) FROM reviews WHERE rating = 5

question: Show me the top 5 products by price
sql: SELECT title, price FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the average price of all products?
sql: SELECT AVG(price) FROM products

question: How many orders have been shipped?
sql: SELECT COUNT(order_id) FROM orders WHERE shipped_at IS NOT NULL

question: List all users from the USA
sql: SELECT full_name, email FROM users WHERE country = 'USA'

question: What is the total sales for all sellers?
sql: SELECT SUM(total_sales) FROM sellers

question: Find the number of products in each category
sql: SELECT category_id, COUNT(product_id) FROM products GROUP BY category_id

question: Show me the 10 most recent orders
sql: SELECT order_id, created_at FROM orders ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10

question: What is the average quantity of order items?
sql: SELECT AVG(quantity) FROM order_items

question: How many sellers have joined in the last month?
sql: SELECT COUNT(seller_id) FROM sellers WHERE joined_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month'

question: List all products with a price greater than 100
sql: SELECT title, price FROM products WHERE price > 100

question: What is the total amount spent by each user in the last 30 days, listed in descending order?
sql: SELECT u.user_id, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE o.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 day' GROUP BY u.user_id ORDER BY total_spent DESC

question: Find the average rating of all products in the 'Electronics' category
sql: SELECT AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE c.name = 'Electronics'

question: List all sellers who have sold more than 10 products in the last month, along with their total sales
sql: SELECT s.seller_id, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_sales FROM sellers s JOIN products p ON s.seller_id = p.seller_id JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month' GROUP BY s.seller_id HAVING SUM(oi.quantity) > 10

question: Show me the total revenue generated by each category in the last quarter
sql: SELECT c.name, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) AS total_revenue FROM categories c JOIN products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 month' GROUP BY c.name

question: Which products have an average rating of 4 or higher and are currently in stock?
sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.title, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM products p JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id WHERE p.stock_qty > 0 GROUP BY p.product_id, p.title HAVING AVG(r.rating) >= 4

question: Find the total number of orders placed by each user in the last 6 months, grouped by country
sql: SELECT u.country, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE o.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 month' GROUP BY u.country

question: List all sellers who have a rating of 4.5 or higher and have sold at least 5 products
sql: SELECT s.seller_id, s.shop_name, s.rating FROM sellers s JOIN products p ON s.seller_id = p.seller_id JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY s.seller_id, s.shop_name, s.rating HAVING s.rating >= 4.5 AND SUM(oi.quantity) >= 5

question: What is the average price of products in each category?
sql: SELECT c.name, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price FROM categories c JOIN products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.name

question: Show me the total amount spent by users from each country in the last year
sql: SELECT u.country, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE o.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year' GROUP BY u.country

question: Find the top 5 products with the highest average rating in the 'Fashion' category
sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.title, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM products p JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE c.name = 'Fashion' GROUP BY p.product_id, p.title ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 5

question: List all users who have placed at least 2 orders in the last 3 months, along with their total spend
sql: SELECT u.user_id, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE o.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 month' GROUP BY u.user_id HAVING COUNT(o.order_id) >= 2

question: What is the total revenue generated by each seller in the last 2 months?
sql: SELECT s.seller_id, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) AS total_revenue FROM sellers s JOIN products p ON s.seller_id = p.seller_id JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 month' GROUP BY s.seller_id

question: Show me the average rating of products in each category, filtered by products with at least 5 reviews
sql: SELECT c.name, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM categories c JOIN products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id GROUP BY c.name HAVING COUNT(r.review_id) >= 5

question: Find the total number of products sold by each seller in the last quarter, grouped by category
sql: SELECT s.seller_id, c.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_sold FROM sellers s JOIN products p ON s.seller_id = p.seller_id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 month' GROUP BY s.seller_id, c.name

question: List all products with a price higher than the average price in their category
sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.title, p.price, c.name FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.price > (SELECT AVG(price) FROM products WHERE category_id = c.category_id)

question: What is the total amount spent by users who have placed at least 3 orders in the last 6 months?
sql: SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id IN (SELECT u.user_id FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE o.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 month' GROUP BY u.user_id HAVING COUNT(o.order_id) >= 3)
